folders.Book 1 - Lord of the Trinity Star: Book 1 - Lord of the Trinity Star

A Falling Star's Memories.name: A Falling Star's Memories
A Falling Star's Memories.descriptionHazard: The shaft walls vanish and are replaced by an endless field of stars in all direction, as if the viewer were suddenly lost in outer space.
A Falling Star's Memories.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:40] (master) to unweave the magic left in the wake of the Trinity Star's passage, @Check[thievery|dc:43] (expert) to etch temporary runes to siphon away the magic, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (8th rank; counteract DC 33) to counteract the magic; three successes are required to disable the trap. Once the PCs are within the trap's overwhelming illusion, they can still attempt these checks to disable it, but the check DCs increase by 2.
A Falling Star's Memories.routine:
A Voyage Through the Infinite: (1 action) Every round on its turn, the trap inflicts all creatures in the shaft with the perception that they have been hurtling at an unimaginable speed through the vastness of space. The stars are so distant that no indication of movement can be observed or felt beyond that overwhelming mental conviction. At the same time, the creatures feel as if something unimaginably powerful and hungry is chasing them... and gaining on them. Any PC who looks over their shoulder sees that the stars are indeed winking out behind them, as if an immense black object were growing closer or as if the stars themselves were vanishing. While the PC's body is somehow protected by the vastness of space, their minds are not—each PC must attempt a @Check[will|dc:40] save.

Критический успех: As success below, but the creature also realizes they're reliving the memories of Runelord Xanderghul—like him, they're escaping some sort of horrific fate and are hurtling toward Golarion. The next time this creature achieves a critical success against this trap, they suddenly see Golarion loom large, and as they witness their "crash" into the Throne of the Troll King, they suddenly wake, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60], in area C1 at the heart Xin-Cyrusian. If any other PCs are still trapped in the Falling Star's Memories, a PC in Xin-Cyrusian knows instinctively that they can call out to those trapped PCs—each PC in Xin-Cyrusian who does so reduces the save DC against A Voyage Through the Infinite for those still trapped by 5.

Успех: The creature realizes they're experiencing the path the Trinity Star took through the cosmos and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Провал: The creature's grip on reality fades as they experience what seems like years or even decades of hurtling adrift through a vast expanse. The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 24 hours or increases the value of their stupefied condition by 1 if they're already stupefied.

Критический провал: As failure, but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (or increase the stupefied condition by 2).

Особенность: If this trap would cause a creature's stupefied condition to exceed @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 5}, the creature instead "crashes" to the ground on the hilltop outside, about ten feet from the Throne of the Troll King. The creature takes @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] save), and their stupefied condition now has an unlimited duration.

items.name: Moment of Glory
items.description:
Триггер: A creature moves (or falls) more than 60 feet down the shaft below the illusory throne

Эффект: All creatures in the shaft suddenly witness an endless night sky all around them, as if they were hurtling through outer space with no sign of any nearby planetary bodies. Each affected creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:40] save to resist being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure) for 24 hours as the visual overwhelms them. The trap then rolls initiative.

Abysium Sentinel.name: Abysium Sentinel
Abysium Sentinel.description:
This creature is crafted from a toxic skymetal known as abysium.

Thassilonian sentinels are crafted in the shapes of skulls or heads.

Sentinel Sets

Thassilonian sentinels were typically carved from marble, ivory, and bronze, easily blending in with most statues. Rarer sentinels carved from wood, coral, and skymetals were often commissioned in sets alongside matching statues to ensure seamless fits or were carefully sculpted for display alone.
Abysium Sentinel.language: не может говорить ни на одном языке

items.name: Green Glow
items.description: 15 feet. A creature beginning its turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:37|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened,inflicts:enfeebled] save to avoid becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure). A creature that's already sickened instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} on a failure (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} on a critical failure) for 24 hours.

items.name: Security Alert
items.description:
Триггер: The abysium sentinel becomes aware of an unfamiliar creature

Эффект: The abysium sentinel alerts its owner of an intruder, either with a mental or audible alarm, depending on established orders. The mental alarm has a range of 1 mile.

items.name: Statue's Head
items.description: Until the next time it acts, the abysium sentinel appears to be the head of a statue it's perched atop. It has an automatic result of 58 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as nothing more than a statue's head.

Adamantine Sentinel.name: Adamantine Sentinel
Adamantine Sentinel.description:
This sentinel has a canine skull adorned with patterns of constellations.

Thassilonian sentinels are crafted in the shapes of skulls or heads.

Sentinel Sets

Thassilonian sentinels were typically carved from marble, ivory, and bronze, easily blending in with most statues. Rarer sentinels carved from wood, coral, and skymetals were often commissioned in sets alongside matching statues to ensure seamless fits or were carefully sculpted for display alone.
Adamantine Sentinel.language: не может говорить ни на одном языке

items.name: Security Alert
items.description:
Триггер: The adamantine sentinel becomes aware of an unfamiliar creature

Эффект: The adamantine sentinel alerts its owner of an intruder, either with a mental or audible alarm, depending on established orders. The mental alarm has a range of 1 mile.

items.name: Statue's Head
items.description: Until the next time it acts, the adamantine sentinel appears to be the head of a statue it's perched atop. It has an automatic result of 53 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as nothing more than a statue's head.

items.name: Adaptive Rune Magic
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Триггер: Aethusa Casts a Spell of 6th rank or higher

Эффект: Aethusa momentarily infuses her preferred form of sin magic (sloth) with the power of either gluttony or greed magic. The triggering spell slot is expended, but instead of the spell's normal effects, Aethusa casts either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dN8QBNuTiaBHCKUe] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fd31tAHSSGXyOxW6] at 6th rank.

items.name: Past Lives
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: Aethusa accesses what she believes to be the memories of two previous runelords. For the next 1 minute, whenever Aethusa makes a skill check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo], she rolls three times and uses the highest result.

items.name: Ускоренное колдовство
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: If Aethusa's next action is to cast a cantrip or a spell that is 6th rank or lower, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

items.name: Стойкое колдовство
items.description: If a reaction would disrupt Aethusa's spellcasting action, she attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. On a success, the action isn't disrupted.

Aethusa's Prison.name: Aethusa's Prison
Aethusa's Prison.descriptionHazard: A roiling sphere of chromatic energy floats above a pedestal marked with arcane symbols.
Aethusa's Prison.disable: @Check[nature|dc:42] (legendary) or @Check[crafting|dc:45] (master) to remove an immunity the prison currently has to one of the following damage types: acid, cold, electricity, or fire (this effect lasts until the prison uses its Energy Immunity reaction to regain that immunity); @Check[arcana|dc:42] (master) to fortify the pedestal's containment runes, preventing the prison from using its Chromatic Eruption action for 1 round and causing it to suffer feedback that inflicts @Damage[20[untyped]] damage (this damage bypasses the prison's hardness and immunities); @Check[thievery|dc:42] (master) or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (8th rank; counteract DC 34) to suppress the pedestal's containment runes for 1 round, preventing the prison from using its Self-Repair action and causing it to suffer feedback that inflicts @Damage[20[untyped]] damage (this damage bypasses the prison's hardness and immunities). Unlike most hazards, Aethusa's prison can't be disabled, but it can be destroyed by reducing it to 0 Hit Points.
Aethusa's Prison.reset: The trap deactivates and then resets automatically when it repairs to its maximum Hit Points.
Aethusa's Prison.routine: (2 actions) The prison uses its first action to Self-Repair. If the hazard has less than its maximum Hit Points, it then uses its Chromatic Eruption action.

items.name: Lockdown Protocol
items.description:
Триггер: The prison takes any damage

Эффект: The prison uses its Chromatic Eruption action as part of this reaction, then gains immunity to the triggering damage type until the hazard resets. The hazard then rolls initiative.

items.name: Саморемонт
items.description: The prison regains @Damage[30[healing]] Hit Points. Then, if the prison is at maximum Hit Points, the hazard deactivates and immediately resets.

items.name: Chromatic Eruption
items.description:
Требования: The prison has less than its maximum Hit Points

Эффект: Tendrils of uncontained magical energy lash at creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], dealing @Damage[10d6[untyped]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:37|basic] save) of a randomly determined type. Roll [[/gmr 1d4]]: 1–acid, 2–cold, 3–electricity, 4–fire.

items.name: Energy Immunity
items.description:
Триггер: The prison takes acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage

Эффект: The prison takes the damage but then gains immunity to the triggering damage type until the hazard resets.

Ancient One.name: Ancient One
Ancient One.description:
In the Dimension of Time, creatures clad in tattered robes float between encapsulated bubbles of still, captured moments, untethered to any other place, unspeaking and unseeing. The few mortals to meet these enigmatic, faceless creatures have never known them to identify by any name other than the ancient ones, seemingly holding no identity (or no identity they wish to share) beyond their relationship with time.

The ancients profess to have always existed in the Dimension of Time, and for time to have always existed in the Great Beyond. Most reside in Stethelos, the storied city at the center of time, though they're also found wandering the Void, crossing the strangest corners of the Maelstrom where it lies between other planes, and occasionally, venturing into dark corners of the Universe. They serve at the will of Tawil at'Umr, the All in One and the One in All, an avatar of Yog-Sothoth lurking deep within time as Stethelos's caretaker. Though the ancient ones resemble their master in stature and attire, and though none would describe Tawil at'Umr as anything other than ancient in origin, most scholars consider "ancient one" a classification of its own separate from that of Great Old One, and Tawil at'Umr is definitively counted among the Great Old Ones by all who know it.

Where Yog-Sothoth is an embodiment of all space and time, an entity who concerns himself with guarding cosmic secrets, the ancient ones are philosophers and mystics seeking ever more enlightenment. They search, have searched, and will search across time indefinitely and, having found entropy and disorder, conclude this to be the Great Beyond's ultimate purpose. When a new creature dawns, it's pristine and whole—perfectly ordered—for but a single moment before it can be eroded by Pharasma's poison, accumulating decay, change, and chaos, until finally it reaches its ending, when time leaves a twilight creature broken and gone. Law and chaos, the ancient ones believe, aren't opposing or even separate forces, but a single expression of reality viewed from two angles, different from each other only in time.

How Old is Time?

Lying in parallel with the Great Beyond with a presence felt on nearly every plane, from the Inner Sphere to the Outer Rifts, the Dimension of Time holds too many secrets for a reality so seemingly omnipresent. Can a world truly be said to begin before time is there to start? Scholars say Pharasma is the oldest being in the Great Beyond, a survivor of some previous multiverse's collapse, but does the Lady of Graves predate time, or did she bring the Dimension of Time with her so history could begin everything anew?

Into the Dimension of Time

The Dimension of Time is one of the most difficult and complex realms in the Great Beyond to travel to, with restrictions on its access limiting all but the most powerful of planar travelers from visiting it. At the GM's discretion, though, items looted from an ancient one, or even just fragments torn from their robes, could function as the planar key needed to allow a PC to use interplanar teleport to access the Dimension of Time.

items.name: Межпланарный телепорт (по желанию, только на себя)
Чувство энтропии
items.description: The ancient one can predict the presence of a creature through supernatural insight into chaotic probabilities and chance and builds a perception of reality from this information, allowing them to "see" as a precise sense in the listed range. Invisible creatures are visible to them, but veil of privacy prevents a creature from being detected via entropy sense automatically (without a counteract check).

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The ancient one ends one condition affecting them.

items.name: Мифическая устойчивость [Воля]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Не дышит
items.description: An ancient one doesn't breathe and is immune to effects that require breathing (such as inhaled poisons).

items.name: Чужеродный разум
items.description: Whenever a creature targets the ancient one with a mental effect, that creature takes @Damage[6d8[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:39|basic] save). On a critical failure, the creature also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: The Connection Cuts Both Ways
items.description: Creatures the ancient one affected with a mental effect or communicated with telepathically within the last round can hijack the ancient one's telepathic connection; they automatically ignore the ancient one's immunity to auditory, emotion, and visual effects until the end of their current turn. They can additionally spend 1 Mythic Point as a free action to reach through the connection to manipulate the ancient one's mind, ignoring the ancient one's mythic resilience on Will saving throws.

items.name: Неумирающий миф
items.description:
Стоимость: all of the Ancient One's Mythic Points

Триггер: The ancient one would die and has at least 1 Mythic Point

Эффект: The ancient one remains conscious, and recovers 50% of their maximum Hit Points.

items.name: Unified Timeline
items.description:
Триггер: A creature ends its movement within 10 feet of the ancient one

Эффект: Ancient ones exist spread out across infinite times and places simultaneously and can shift themselves through their catalog of potentialities. The ancient one teleports themself and the triggering creature into empty squares within 10 feet of their respective positions, though the triggering creature can't be moved into hazardous terrain or to a place it can't stand. An unwilling creature can resist the teleportation with a successful @Check[will|dc:42] save.

items.name: Dismantle All Life
items.description: Time and entropy end all things, even the undead. When the ancient one's Strikes hit a creature with void healing, they deal vitality damage instead of void damage. The ancient one can't use their Strikes to restore Hit Points to living or undead creatures.

items.name: Перезарядка
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The ancient one regains an expended spell.

items.name: Перебросить
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Триггер: The ancient one fails a check

Эффект: The ancient one rerolls the check.

items.name: Slither Between Worlds
items.description: The ancient one instantly transports themself and any items they're wearing and holding from their current space to an unoccupied space within 100 feet they can see. Once per turn, the ancient one can spend 1 Mythic Point to slither between worlds as a free action on their turn.

items.name: Vision of Lost Meaning
items.description:
The ancient one speaks without sound, contacting a creature within 120 feet telepathically to send out waves of visions that fill its mind with fragmented thoughts, unrealized chaos, and futures where its choices are never consequential. The target attempts a @Check[will|dc:42] save.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target is disoriented by the visions and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh] for 1 round.

Провал: The target is overwhelmed by the visions and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] for 1 minute.

Критический провал: Как провал, но цель также @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлена 3}.

Animate Nightmare.name: Animate Nightmare
Animate Nightmare.description:
Whereas animate dreams form from the fears of specific individuals, animate nightmares are spawned by the terrors that beset civilizations. An animate nightmare's appearance depends on the type of fear that created it, but, like fears, result in similar forms.

Emigrants From Dreams

Animate nightmares often haunt the ruins of the civilization that birthed them. Others are drawn to Jandelay, the enigmatic demiplane where the fragments of dead worlds are preserved for all eternity, or to Abaddon, where apocalyptic nihilism is the rule. These latter nightmares might stay close to their "parent" civilizations, while others wander the broken avenues of multiple worlds, feeding off the traces of fear that linger in those places.
Animate Nightmare.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Apocalyptic Embodiment
items.description:
An animate nightmare embodies one societal fear, chosen from the following options. Depending on the choice, the animate nightmare gains one additional 8th-rank occult innate spell, as listed below.

Disaster: The animate nightmare appears as a person or creature who's suffered devastating wounds from a calamity—horrific burns, crushed and broken limbs, impalements from wind-tossed debris, and the like. It gains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0XP2XOxT9VSiXFDr] at 8th rank.

Disorder: The animate nightmare looks like a distorted parody of a commonplace person with unnaturally long limbs, a twisted visage, and a scratching shrill voice. It gains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY] at 8th rank.

Famine: The animate nightmare appears as a humanoid carrion bird or other bestial scavenger (such as a jackal or a fly) on the brink of death from starvation. It gains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fd31tAHSSGXyOxW6] at 8th rank.

Мор: The animate nightmare is shaped like a tangle of diseased bodies animated into hideous life that might have just crawled out of a mass grave. It gains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MS60WhVifb45qORJ] at 8th rank.

items.name: Panicking Touch
items.description:
Требования: The animate nightmare's previous action was a nightmare tendril Strike against a creature

Эффект: The animate nightmare's touch lingers and infuses the mind of the creature it just attempted to Strike. The creature takes @Damage[8d6[persistent,mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:38|basic] save). If the creature is already taking persistent mental damage from Panicking Touch, it must instead succeed at a @Check[will|dc:38] save or endure a different effect based on the animate nightmare's apocalyptic embodiment; this additional effect lasts as long as the persistent mental damage lasts.

Disaster: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} and can't reduce its frightened condition.

Disorder: Цель в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательстве}.

Famine: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Мор: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Animus of Longing.name: Animus of Longing
Animus of Longing.descriptionHazard: Three pitchers pour water in an endless cascade, each decorated with a symbol of fertility, fecundity, and desire. The pitchers never empty, and the fountain below never overflows; the entire thing flickers with eerie red energy.
Animus of Longing.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:50] (legendary) or @Check[society|dc:50] (legendary) to decipher the symbols and runes scribed across on the runewell and pinpoint which runes can be used to deactivate it, @Check[thievery|dc:53] (legendary) to temporarily disrupt the anima focus's connection to the Eye of Desire or to destroy a phantom of desire; three total successes are required to disable the hazard (destroying a phantom of desire counts as a single success)
Animus of Longing.reset: The animus of longing deactivates as soon as no foes remain in the atrium, then immediately resets.
Animus of Longing.routine: (1 action) On its turn, the animus of longing sustains the three phantoms of desire. The three creatures each take their turn.
Animus of Longing.stealth: (legendary) to detect the dangerous and sealed entrance to the Eye of Desire; noticing the anima focus itself has a DC of 0

items.name: Shroud of Passion's Might
items.description:
Триггер: A creature attempts to use the anima focus to open the way into the Eye of Desire

Эффект: The Runewell of Lust's magic reaches out of the Eye of Desire and into the minds of all nearby creatures, creating vivid, dreamlike hallucinations fulfilling their greatest desires. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:44] save with the following effects. The hazard then manifests three phantoms of desire—incarnations of Runelord Sorshen empowered by certain beliefs that she hasn't actually turned over a proverbial new leaf and is playing a long-con game to take over the world. The phantoms and the hazard then roll initiative.

Критический успех: The creature understands the false nature of the hallucination but gleans useful insights from what they see, gaining a +2 status bonus to one Perception check, saving throw, or skill check made before the end of their next turn.

Успех: The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh] for 1 round, then recognizes the hallucination for what it is and blocks it from their mind.

Провал: The creature becomes lost in the hallucination, struggling to tell it apart from reality. The creature becomes dazzled and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as long as they remain in Sorshen's atrium. At the end of each of the creature's turns, it may attempt a new @Check[will|dc:44] save to end this effect.

Критический провал: As failure, but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}, and the Will save to end the effect is DC 48.

Apocalypse Stormfront.name: Apocalypse Stormfront
Apocalypse Stormfront.descriptionHazard: An endless void stretches in all directions. Visions of Golarion's destruction roll like storm clouds across the space.
Apocalypse Stormfront.disable: @Check[acrobatics|dc:47] to Fly through the space without becoming stuck in the webs, @Check[athletics|dc:50] to Climb the webs and make progress forward through the infinite, @Check[nature|dc:47] or @Check[occultism|dc:47] or @Check[arcana|dc:50] or @Check[religion|dc:50] (legendary) to collapse the extradimensional space, or @Check[perception|dc:52] to peer through the visions of Golarion to notice discrepancies that help keep the overwhelming despair from setting in; six successes disables the hazard, causing it to vanish forever and shunting all creatures to Liralarue's Prison.
Apocalypse Stormfront.reset: The hazard resets automatically once no creatures are in the area.
Apocalypse Stormfront.routine:
(1 action) (arcane, emotion, illusion, mental) A stormfront filled with illusory scenes of Golarion's destruction rolls through the extradimensional space. Each creature in the hazard's area takes @Damage[6d12[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:42|basic|traits:arcane,emotion,illusion,mental] save). On a failed save, a creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 2} on a critical failure). A PC reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage is shunted back into area C7.

A creature that takes damage while Climbing the webs must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save or fall. A creature can try to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY] (@Check[reflex|dc:40]). On a success, they lose one success they've earned to escape the hazard but otherwise arrest their fall. On a failure, they plummet into the void, losing all Athletics successes they've earned to escape the hazard. Each round on their turn, the character can try to Grab an Edge again, but each time they fail to do so, the party must earn an additional success to escape the hazard. Characters who fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf] or repeatedly fail to Grab an Edge might effectively become lost in the void, though once the nightmare hazard is disabled, they appear along with the rest of the PCs in Liralarue's Prison.

items.name: Brewing Storm
items.description:
Триггер: A creature enters the shaft leading to area C8

Эффект: Storm clouds roiling with gouts of fire, bolts of lightning, and the wails of uncountable souls form in the distance. The hazard then rolls initiative.

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: Areelu ends one condition affecting her.

items.name: Мифическая устойчивость [Воля и Стойкость]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Уязвимость к отвержению
items.description: Areelu Vorlesh's apotheosis into a demon has made her vulnerable to rejection like a succubus. When Areelu fails a Deception check to Embrace or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72], or when a creature succeeds at its save against her mental spells or abilities, she takes @Damage[6d6[mental]] damage. For 1 hour after causing mental damage to Areelu in this way, the creature can deal @Damage[6d6[mental]] damage to her with a successful @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF] action incorporating its rejection.

items.name: Неумирающий миф
items.description:
Стоимость: all of Areelu's Mythic Points

Триггер: Areelu would die and has at least 1 Mythic Point

Эффект: Areelu remains standing and conscious and recovers @Damage[200[healing]] Hit Points.

items.name: Объятие
items.description: Areelu attempts to [[/act grapple skill=deception]] a creature using her Deception bonus instead of Athletics. If the creature is willing, Areelu automatically succeeds.

items.name: Kiss of Locusts
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: Areelu engages a creature she has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM] in an embrace or other act of passion, creating an opportunity for a cloud of locusts to enter the creature's body. The creature takes @Damage[5d6[persistent,bleed]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] for as long as they remain sickened.

items.name: Перезарядка
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: Areelu regains an expended spell slot.

items.name: Перебросить
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Триггер: Areelu fails a check

Эффект: Areelu rerolls the check.

Ayavah.name: Ayavah
Ayavah.allSaves: +1 status to saves against spells and magic effects

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Фокусировка наследия крови
items.description: When Ayavah Refocuses, she completely fills her focus pool.

items.name: Развращение греха
items.description: When Ayavah casts a bloodline spell using a Focus Point or one of the following spells: blister, disintegrate, divine wrath, enlarge, fear, or slow, she can choose to either give a target a –1 status penalty to AC for 1 round or gain a +2 status bonus to Intimidation checks for 1 round.

items.name: Legendary Sculptor
items.description: Ayavah makes Crafting checks associated with sculpture at legendary proficiency. If she rolls a failure on a Crafting check involving sculpture, she gets a success instead.

items.name: Досягаемое заклинание
items.description: If the next action Ayavah takes is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase that spell's range by 30 feet.

Baolen.name: Baolen
Baolen.description: Кракен — огромный, кальмароподобный левиафан с жестоким разумом. Он охотится и на корабли, и на китов, и на героев. Ненависть и зависть кракенов к своим соперникам, алголлусам, заставляет многих кракенов устраивать свои логова в затонувших городах, где они могут рыться в древних знаниях в поисках давно утерянных арканных тайн.

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: Существо завершает одно действующее на него состояние.

items.name: Измененная погода
items.description:
A kraken reshapes the weather within 2 miles of it, with the effect of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XkDCzMIyc0YOjw05] ritual centered on the kraken and based on its emotional state, at the GM's discretion. If the kraken dies, the weather returns to normal immediately.

Baolen is currently content in his place as an object of worship, though, so the surrounding weather remains calm.

items.name: Мифическая устойчивость [Воля и Стойкость]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Susceptible to Confusion
items.description: Baolen's mythic resilience doesn't apply to Will saving throws he makes against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] condition. If Baolen starts his turn confused, he takes @Damage[6d10[mental]] damage.

items.name: Неумирающий миф
items.description:
Стоимость: all of Baolen's Mythic Points

Триггер: Baolen would die and has at least 1 Mythic Point

Эффект: Baolen remains standing and conscious, and recovers 50% of his maximum Hit Points.

items.name: Сжимать
items.description:
@Damage[(2d10+17)[bludgeoning]], простой спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:40|basic]{Стойкости}

При провале спасброска, задерживающее дыхание существо теряет [[/gmr 1d4 #Потерянные раунды воздуха]]{1d4 раундов} воздуха.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

items.name: Curse of Flawed History
items.description:
Спасбросок: @Check[will|dc:37]

Эффект: The target struggles to differentiate between alternate histories and how the past truly occurred. The creature takes a –2 status penalty to checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo] (or a –4 penalty on a critical failure). This curse has an unlimited duration.

items.name: Двойная атака
items.description:
Кракен наносит 2 "Удара" двумя разными руками или щупальцами, каждая конечность целится в разных существ. Для штрафа множественных атак кракена, "Двойная атака" считается 2 атаками, но штраф не увеличивается, пока не совершены обе атаки.

Если после этого кракен использует действие @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Tkd8sH4pwFIPzqTr]{Захват}, то он "Захватывает" любое количество существ по которым попал "Двойной атакой".

items.name: Чернильное облако
items.description:
The kraken releases a cloud of black, venomous ink in an @Template[emanation|distance:80]. This cloud has no effect outside water.

Creatures inside the ink cloud are exposed to retrocognitive ink poison and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf] while inside the cloud.

The kraken can't use Ink Cloud again for [[/br 2d6 #Recharge Ink Cloud]]{2d6 rounds}, and the cloud dissipates after 1 minute.

items.name: Реактивная струя
items.description: Кракен передвигается в воде вплоть до 280 футов по прямой линии, не провоцируя никакие реакции.

items.name: Мифическая сила
items.description: У существа есть запас из 3 Очков Мифа, и оно может потратить эти Очки Мифа на любое из своих действий.

items.name: Перезарядка
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: Baolen regains an expended spell.

items.name: Retrocognitive Ink
items.description:
Baolen is immune to this poison

Спасбросок: @Check[will|dc:40]

Макс.продолжительность: 10 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Стадия 2: @Damage[5d6[mental]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}, and the target is exposed to the curse of flawed history (1 round)

Belimarius.name: Belimarius
Belimarius.allSaves: +1 status vs. magical effects, +4 status vs. mental effects HP 350; Immunities aging, disease; R

items.name: Warshard of Gorum
items.gm: Melts away into a harmless bloodstain if taken from Belimarius before she can Sacrifice Warshard

items.name: Эффект заклинания: Скрытый разум
items.description:
Предоставляется заклинанием @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.C2w3YfBKjIRS07DP]

Вы получаете бонус состояния +4 к спасброскам против @Trait[Mental]{ментальных} эффектов.

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: Belimarius ends one condition affecting her.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Immortality
items.description: Belimarius is immortal and immune to the negative effects of aging and disease, and she's resistant to mental damage. Her immortality doesn't prevent her death from other means.

items.name: Never Enough
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within 30 feet casts a spell with the air, earth, fire, metal, water, wood, or void trait that deals damage

Эффект: Belimarius seethes with jealousy at another spellcaster's magical accomplishments. She regains @Damage[25[healing]] Hit Points, and until the end of her next turn, Belimarius's spell DC increases by 1, and her spell attacks gain a +1 circumstance bonus.

items.name: Ответное заклинание
items.description:
Триггер: Belimarius is the target of a spell she's aware of

Эффект: Belimarius attempts to counteract the triggering spell with a [[/r 1d20+35 #Counteract]]{+35} counteract modifier and a counteract rank of 10. If the triggering spell would be counteracted, it instead continues with the caster as a target instead of Belimarius.

items.name: Неумирающий миф
items.description:
Стоимость: all of Belimarius's Mythic Points

Триггер: Belimarius would die and has at least 1 Mythic Point

Эффект: Belimarius remains standing and conscious, and recovers @Damage[175[healing]] Hit Points.

items.name: Manifest Halberd
items.description:
Требования: Belimarius has a free hand and isn't holding her Invidious Halberd

Эффект: Belimarius calls her Invidious Halberd, and it appears in one of her hands.

items.name: Mythic Ascension
items.description:
Триггер: Runelord Belimarius reduces a mythic creature to 0 HP, or the PCs take more than 24 hours to confront her after securing entrance to the Eye of Desire

Эффект: The warshard Belimarius has fused with the Runewell of Lust flares with a sudden flash of blood-red light. Belimarius gains the mythic trait, 3 Mythic Points, and her Mythic Powers. In time, she might develop additional mythic powers, but only if she survives her encounter with the PCs.

items.name: Ускоренное колдовство
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: If Runelord Belimarius's next action is to cast a cantrip or spell of 8th rank or lower, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

items.name: Перезарядка
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: Belimarius regains an expended spell.

items.name: Sacrifice Warshard
items.description:
Триггер: Belimarius begins her turn

Требования: Belimarius has the warshard of Gorum held in a hand

Эффект: While its mythic potential and divine power has largely been used to transform the Eye of Desire and the Runewell of Lust into the forms described in Chapter 1 to enable her imminent mythic ascension, enough power remains within to generate one final effect. With a quick motion, Belimarius crushes the mostly depleted warshard she holds in her hand, destroying it and causing red rain to cascade down around her in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:120] (which easily fills the entirety of the Eye of Desire). Allies in this area (Belimarius and her two knights of malice) become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl] for 1 minute but can use the extra action only to Strike with a melee weapon. Foes in the area (including the PCs) must attempt a @Check[will|dc:41] save.

Критический успех: The creature absorbs some of Gorum's legacy and gains 1 Mythic Point that they must spend before the end of their next turn.

Успех: Существо невредимо.

Провал: The creature is overwhelmed with despair at Gorum's death and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Критический провал: The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] with despair at Gorum's death. At the end of each of its turns, the creature can attempt a @Check[will|dc:41] save to end the effect, with the DC lowered by 2 each subsequent round.

Bittersweet Mask.name: Bittersweet Mask
Bittersweet Mask.descriptionHazard: The many iron bars of this iron mask fits tightly around Javownir's head and snout, looking almost as if it was built in place to conform specifically to the shape of his skull with no apparent latch or hinge for it to be removed.
Bittersweet Mask.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:45] (expert) twice to find the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC] latches, @Check[athletics|dc:48] (master) to wrench the mask open quickly enough to prevent it from triggering before it's destroyed, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (9th-rank; counteract DC 35), or automatic with Spleen's key
Bittersweet Mask.reset: The mask resets automatically at the start of the round after it is triggered.

items.name: Linked to Javownir
items.description: Whenever the mask takes damage, Javownir takes the same damage (@Check[reflex|dc:44|basic] save)

items.name: Toxic Off-gassing
items.description:
Триггер: The mask takes damage, or an Athletics check to wrench it free fails or critically fails

Эффект: The mask creates a cloud of poison gas in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] around Javownir. Creatures in the area take @Damage[(6d12+41)[poison]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:44|basic] save; Javownir treats the result of this save as one degree of success worse than the rolled result).

items.name: Ковен
items.description:
A Bittersweet Sister adds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PHVHBbdHeQRfjLmE] to her coven's spells.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Coven]

items.name: Поцелуй лунного света
items.description:
A moon hag in an area illuminated by moonlight gains a +2 status bonus to AC and initiative rolls. In the light of a full moon, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl], and can use the extra action only to Stride or Strike. If the moon hag has a fly Speed, they can use the extra action to Fly as well.

Any time they're outside of the oubliette or in area C7 they are in moonlight.

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description:
The moon hag can take on the appearance of any Medium humanoid woman. This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage bonuses with their Strikes, but it might change the damage type their Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning).

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

items.name: Ужасное предсказание
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: The moon hag howls a series of dreadful, apocalyptic predictions at a single creature within 30 feet, shattering its perceptions of reality. The target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:38] save and takes a –2 circumstance penalty to the save if it can see the moon. On a failure, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} on a critical failure) until the curse is removed. Regardless of the outcome, the creature is then temporarily immune for 24 hours.

items.name: Раздирать
items.description:
Коготь

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Rend]

items.name: Ride the Moonbeams
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: The moon hag teleports themself and any items they're wearing and holding to another space within 30 feet, or 60 feet if they're in moonlight. They then gain a 25-foot fly Speed until the end of their next turn. If the moon hag is in the air when the effect ends, they float to the ground, taking no falling damage.

Any time they're outside of the oubliette or in area C7 they are in moonlight.

Cataclysmic Planar Rift.name: Cataclysmic Planar Rift
Cataclysmic Planar Rift.descriptionHazard: This apocalypse represents the effects of numerous planar rifts forming and exploding in a region, with the risk of the planar fabric being compromised enough to tear a city-sized (if not larger) hole in reality. These rifts are likely to eject inhabitants of the other plane into the Universe, as well as serve as gateways for furious defenders to pour through to punish anyone they think might be responsible for the problem. Any additional encounters that result from these incursions should award XP as normal for encounters of their difficulty. While the rifts are likely to all lead to the same plane, particularly far-reaching disruptions might create gateways to multiple planes at once, with each rift spewing forth its own defenders. These groups would each have their own aims and agendas, clashing, collaborating, or causing chaos wherever they go.
Cataclysmic Planar Rift.disable: DC 42 Lore (expert) with the plane's Lore skill, @Check[arcana|dc:45] (master), @Check[nature|dc:45] (master), @Check[occultism|dc:45] (master), @Check[religion|dc:45] (master) or @Check[performance|dc:48] (legendary) to perform a planar stabilization rite to minimize the damage
Cataclysmic Planar Rift.routine:
(1+ hours, @Check[flat|dc:18]) Rifts detonate with raw planar essence. As the hazard progresses, the ruptures grow more frequent until they merge together into a gaping portal (this final stage might be prevented with good fortune or successful efforts to Prepare). Ruptures occur once per 10 minutes for the first hour and once per minute for the second hour. The frequency with which each unprepared creature in the area is hit by a rupture depends upon their proximity to the hazard's epicenter. If the hazard proceeds into a third hour, all creatures and objects in the area take the hazard's damage one final time before being swallowed up by the burgeoning portal and deposited on the other plane.

The planar explosions deal 2d12+18 damage, with a DC 42 basic saving throw, and inflict a condition on a failed saving throw. The damage type, saving throw type, condition, and condition duration depend upon the exploding plane, as detailed in the table below.

Clockwork Whale.name: Заводной кит
Clockwork Whale.description:
Из всех заводных механизмов древнего Азланта заводные киты, пожалуй, самые впечатляющие — или, по крайней мере, одни из самых крупных. Созданные в форме причудливого сочетания акулы и огромного зубатого кита, заводные киты веками патрулировали морские пути вокруг Азланта, прежде чем Землепад разрушил континент, погрузив его под воду. Считается, что заводные киты, оснащенные комплексным программированием и сенсорными решениями, обеспечивающими почти идеальную навигацию, использовались в основном для обеспечения новых и безопасных морских маршрутов, хотя некоторые из них служили военно-морскими транспортами во время холодной войны Азланта с древним врагом империи, алголлусами.

Челюсти заводного кита, длина которых составляет почти треть его длины, могут легко разрезать небольшие морские суда и нанести сокрушительный ущерб корпусам более крупных. Эти механизмы быстро разрезают проглоченных животных целиком на фрагменты, которые затем медленно вымываются потоком воды через крошечные отверстия в теле существа.

Замысловатые, сложные машины — заводные механизмы, созданные с особой тщательностью высококвалифицированными инженерами. Несмотря на то, что в их создании задействована некоторая доля магии, в основном они механические, состоящие из точно настроенных шестеренок и пружин, работающих согласованно.

Прочная пружина в часовом механизме должна быть заведена, чтобы обеспечить энергию, необходимую для работы устройства. Некоторые крупные заводные механизмы содержат несколько пружин для разных конечностей, каждую из которых нужно заводить. Во время создания заводного механизма обычно требуется вставить ключ в заднюю часть механизма и повернуть его по часовой стрелке. Большие заводные механизмы требуют большей силы для поворота ключа и обычно имеют более крупные ключи, чтобы обеспечить больший крутящий момент — некоторые из них даже рассчитаны на команду заводчиков, а не на одного смертного. Для программирования часового механизма требуется как ключ, так и знания, позволяющие правильно задать программу, которые обычно хранятся у создателя или владельца заводного механизма.

items.name: Водная эхолокация
items.description: Заводной кит может использовать свой слух как точное чувство в указанном радиусе, но только под водой.

items.name: Потрясающее ориентирование
items.description: Находясь в большом водоёме, заводной кит считает провал проверки Выживания для @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.fJImDBQfqfjKJOhk] или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD] как успех.

items.name: Самозаводка
items.description: Заводной кит заводит сам себя во время плавания, и если он тратит на плавание хотя бы минуту в день, то получает 24 часа рабочего времени. Существо всё еще может совершить проверку [[/act disable-device dc=36]] чтобы @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Отключить устройство}, из-за чего заводной кит потеряет 1 час рабочего времени (или 2 часа при критическом успехе).

items.name: Заводная песня
items.description: Кит издаёт звуки, которые можно услышать на расстоянии до @Unit[Mile|1]{1 мили} или @Unit[Mile|10]{10 миль} под водой. Существа в @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]{20-футовой эманации} (или в @Template[type:emanation|distance:60]{60-футовой эманации} под водой), нанося @Damage[15d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] (простой спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:38|basic]{Стойкости}). При проваленном спасброске, существо также @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено 1} (или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено 3} при критическом провале). Кит не может использовать снова "Заводную песню" [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Gearsong]]{1d4 раунда}.

items.name: Проглотить целиком
items.description:
Огромный, @Damage[(3d10+8)[slashing]], Разрыв 35

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Colossus Rampage.name: Colossus Rampage
Colossus Rampage.descriptionHazard: Monsters of titanic proportions awaken and stampede across the land, crushing everything in their wake. These might be a group of battling kaiju, an army of titanic constructs, or another onslaught of oversized creatures. This hazard works best when combined with combat against one or more massive monsters. These creatures might notice the PCs' strength and decide to get rid of them before the PCs have a chance to interfere with their onslaught.
Colossus Rampage.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:48] (master) or Thievery (master) to lay traps to hamper the approaching rampage; DC 50 (master) skill check with a skill typically used to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo] about the creature's type to make targeted preparations (DC 46 if it's a Lore skill); or @Check[warfare-lore|dc:46] (master), @Check[intimidation|dc:48] (master), or @Check[diplomacy|dc:50] (master) to rally nearby troops to prepare for battle
Colossus Rampage.routine:
(10+ minutes, @Check[flat|dc:15]) The colossus rampage affects the entire area, but whether or not the affected area remains static, moves, expands, or otherwise changes is left to you to determine as the story needs. At the start of each minute, unprepared creatures in the area take @Damage[(3d10+10)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:47|basic] save). A creature that fails the save is jostled enough that they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] for that minute, while a creature that critically fails is pinned under fallen debris and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] until they [[/act escape dc=47]].

Two additional effects, based on the nature of the creatures and the battlefield, take place during that minute. Roll [[/gmr 1d10]] for each to determine on which round during that minute each effect takes place (rerolling duplicate rounds). You can create alternative abilities to better fit the nature of the creatures in the stampede, but in general, consider selecting one ability that imposes a condition or battlefield effect and one that deals damage. Note that these effects can affect prepared and unprepared creatures in the area, but when a prepared creature attempts a save against any of these effects, they increase their result by one degree of success.
Colossus Rampage.stealth: DC 32 (master) skill check with a skill typically used to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo] about the rampaging creatures to notice subtle signs of their proximity in the surrounding landscape (DC 30 if it's a Lore skill) or @Check[survival|dc:38] (master) to notice the ground trembling from immense footfalls

items.name: Deathly Terror
items.description:
The stampede's approach inflicts overwhelming fear upon those who can't escape its path. This ability might represent exposure to frightful presence auras, terrifying howls, or simply the sheer presence of the advancing army. All creatures that start their turn in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:42] save, with the following effects. An affected creature can't reduce the value of its frightened condition while it remains in the aura.

Критический успех: The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune to deathly terror for 10 minutes.

Успех: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 1}.

Провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 2}.

Критический провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Напугано 4}.

items.name: Dust Shroud
items.description: The stampede fills the air with an impenetrable cloud, blocking all vision. This cloud might arise from a dust storm churned up by massive stomping feet, debris from countless ruined buildings, or a magical ability to summon cloying mist. The cloud blocks all vision, making unprepared creatures @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] until they leave the area, and imparting a –4 circumstance penalty to vision-based Perception checks for prepared creatures. Creatures outside the area can't see into the cloud.

items.name: Energy Burst
items.description:
Overlapping blasts of energy or other effects carpet the area. This ability might represent the energy breaths of creatures like dragons, or the overlapping auras of creatures wreathed in fire or other elements. It might also represent the combined effects of numerous spellcasters to cover the region, whether they are part of the stampede itself or defenders attempting to slow the stampede with indiscriminate magic. All creatures in the area take 4d10+12 acid, cold, electricity, fire, sonic, or void damage (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect] save). The damage type depends upon the nature of the magic (or can be randomly determined).

@Damage[(4d10+12)[acid]|options:area-damage]

@Damage[(4d10+12)[cold]|options:area-damage]

@Damage[(4d10+12)[electricity]|options:area-damage]

@Damage[(4d10+12)[fire]|options:area-damage]

@Damage[(4d10+12)[sonic]|options:area-damage]

@Damage[(4d10+12)[void]|options:area-damage]

items.name: Flying Shards
items.description:
The stampede crushes through buildings and rends the ground in its wake. As it does, rocks, trees, metal fragments, and all manner of other dangerous objects soar through the air at perilous speeds. All creatures in the area take 4d10+12 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect] save). The damage type depends upon the nature of what the stampede is currently destroying (or can be randomly determined).

@Damage[(4d10+12)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]

@Damage[(4d10+12)[piercing]|options:area-damage]

@Damage[(4d10+12)[slashing]|options:area-damage]

items.name: Toxic Miasma
items.description:
Poison fills the air, infiltrating the bodies of all who are unfortunate enough to enter its reach. This ability most often represents the effect of a congregation of poisonous monsters, but it could also come about from more unusual circumstances like the destruction of a site used to mass-produce toxic compounds. By default, the miasma exposes all creatures in the area to cerulean scourge, with Fortitude DC of 42. If the creatures in the stampede have their own specific poison with no onset, you can replace cerulean scourge with their poison effect. Use a Fortitude DC of 42 or the poison's normal DC, whichever is higher.

Лазурная плеть: This poison is infamous for making the victim's blood vessels glow with a bright blue light before painfully bursting.

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:42|traits:alchemical,injury,poison]

Макс.продолжительность: 6 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[10d6[poison]] (1 раунд)

Стадия 2: @Damage[12d6[poison]] (1 раунд)

Стадия 3: @Damage[14d6[poison]] (1 раунд)

Commander Yrasthura.name: Commander Yrasthura
Commander Yrasthura.description:
Рунные гиганты — тираны среди себе подобных, наделенные властью повелевать и магически управлять другими гигантами. Когда-то они служили еще более могущественным хозяевам — могущественным волшебникам, известным как рунные лорды, и при этом командовали целыми армиями гигантов, служивших империи рунных владык.

В течение веков после распада этих империй рунные гиганты сохранились как самостоятельный народ, хотя для внешнего мира они не более чем сказочные ужасы, о которых поздними ночами шепчутся суеверные гиганты. Рунные гиганты обычно обитают в самых отдаленных и труднопроходимых горных массивах, но их также можно встретить в огромных руинах на вершинах затерянных островов, в ледниковых долинах или еще более отдаленных или магических регионах.

Поразительная угольная плоть рунных гигантов украшена десятками рун, которые являются мощным проявлением их мистической силы. Рунные гиганты — это огромные существа, в среднем высотой @Unit[Foot|40]{40 футов} и весом @Unit[Pound|25000]{25,000 фунтов}.

Гиганты — массивные гуманоидные существа, которые живут в отдалённых регионах по всему миру. Они сильно отличаются друг от друга, но их объединяет голод: им требуется питаться их стихией в количествах, которое можно ожидать от таких массивных гуманоидов. Хотя для некоторых гигантов это простое дело, более эзотерические типы находят эту потребность суровой реальностью. Если морозного гиганта удовлетворит огромный кусок льда или снега, то теневые гиганты жаждут свернувшихся теней Незримого Мира.

items.name: Эффект заклинания: Полёт
items.description:
Предоставляется заклинанием @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]

Цель может парить в воздухе, получая Скорость полёта, равную её Скорости или 20 футам, в зависимости от того, что больше.

items.name: Реагирующий удар (особый)
items.description:
Рунный гигант получает дополнительную реакцию в начале каждого своего хода, которую может использовать только на "Реагирующий удар".

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

items.name: Команда гигантам
items.description: Когда рунный гигант сотворяет @Trait[Mental]{ментальное} заклинание против другого гиганта, то КС 39 вместо 35

items.name: Требование
items.description: Когда рунный гигант творит свое врождённое @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R9xqCBblkS5KE4y7]{Послание}, то еще может сотворить на эту цель @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.qwlh6aDgi86U3Q7H]{Внушение}.

items.name: Вспыхивающие руны
items.description:
Триггер: Рунный гигант использует @Trait[Arcane]{арканное} умение или творит @Trait[Arcane]{арканное} заклинание

Эффект: Руны на теле гиганта загораются магической энергией. Все существа в @Template[emanation|distance:10]{10-футовой эманации} должны совершить спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:35]{Стойкости}.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Ослеплено} на 1 раунд.

Провал: Существо получает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Слепоту} на 1 раунд.

items.name: Воззвание к руне
items.description:
Рунный гигант взывает к одной из рун на своём теле, из-за чего она извергает @Template[cone|distance:30]{30-футовый конус} искр, наносящий всем существам в конусе @Damage[6d12[electricity]|options:area-damage] (простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:37|basic|options:area-effect]{Рефлекса}).

Гигант не может снова использовать "Воззвание к руне" [[/gmr 1d4 #Перезарядка воззвания к руне]]{1d4 раунда}.

Светящаяся копия вызванной руны появляется на 1 оружии удерживаемом гигантом, наделяя это оружие одним из перечисленных далее эффектов по его выбору.

Эффект на оружии длится 1 минуту. Если гигант накладывает на оружие новую руну, то любая ранее наложенная руна немедленно исчезает, прекращая свое действие.

  • Карающая руна: Когда оружие попадает, гигант может @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.t6cx9FOODmeZQNYl]{Толкнуть} цель назад на 10 футов, или на 20 футов при критическом попадании.
  • Руна пламени: Оружие всеми атаками наносит дополнительные @Damage[3d6[fire]].
  • Руна пространства: Во время хода рунного гиганта, досягаемость оружия увеличивается до 60 футов.
  • Руна уничтожения: Оружие получает признак @Trait[Deadly d8]{смертельное} с 3 костями урона такого же размера, как и у базового оружия, а существо, по которому попадает это оружие, должно преуспеть в спасброске @Check[fortitude|dc:35]{Стойкости}, иначе станет @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощено 1}.

items.name: Широкий замах
items.description: Рунный гигант наносит один "Удар" двуручным мечом и сравнивает результат броска атаки с КБ вплоть до 2 противников в своей досягаемости. Это считается 2 атаками к штрафу множественных атак рунного гиганта.

Covetous Corridor.name: Covetous Corridor
Covetous Corridor.descriptionHazard: Statues depicting the runelords of envy steal magic from intruders.
Covetous Corridor.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:45] (master) to unweave the magic surrounding a statue, @Check[athletics|dc:48] (expert) to wrest a statue's implement from its hands, @Check[thievery|dc:48] (expert) to slip an implement free, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (9th rank; counteract DC 36) to counteract the magic that empowers the statue. Increase the DCs to disable the Belimarius statue by 2. Each statue must be disabled or counteracted separately, and disabling the Belimarius statue or all nine other statues permanently disables the hazard.
Covetous Corridor.reset: The hazard resets automatically if not disabled.
Covetous Corridor.routine: (4 actions) The hazard uses @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k] Magic twice. Once the implements of at least three runelord statues are charged, the hazard uses its next available action to Transfer Magic. If the hazard starts its turn with the Belimarius statue charged, the hazard uses its reaction to Empower Barrier. A disabled runelord statue can't use Steal Magic. If the Belimarius statue is disabled, the hazard can't use Transfer Magic or Empower Barrier.

items.name: Covet Magic
items.description:
Триггер: A magic item or active spell effect enters the corridor

Эффект: A randomly determined statue uses the hazard's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k] Magic action. The hazard then rolls initiative.

items.name: Украсть магию
items.description:
Roll a [[/gmr d10]] to determine which statue activates, rerolling a result of 10 or any result that would indicate a disabled statue or a statue that is already charged. The indicated statue casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kUSShxXzY1sPtJA0] with a [[/gmr 1d20+32 #Counteract]]{+32} bonus to its counteract check. The spell targets the closest magic item within 120 feet, prioritizing the highest-ranking magic item and targeting spell effects only if no magic item is within range. On a success or critical success, the statue gathers the dispersed energy into its implement, charging it.

While the statue's implement remains charged, any creature who is at least an expert in @Check[arcana|dc:44], @Check[nature|dc:44], @Check[occultism|dc:44], or @Check[religion|dc:44] can use a 2-action activity with the concentrate trait to attempt a DC 44 check using that skill. On a success or critical success, they return the magic to its original source, causing it to reactivate. Removing an implement from its statue prevents the statue from using Transfer Magic but doesn't prevent a creature from restoring the charge to its source.

items.name: Transfer Magic
items.description:
Требования: The implements of at least three runelord statues are charged

Эффект: Three statues with charged implements transfer their charges to the Belimarius statue. While the Belimarius statue holds at least one charge, a creature can transfer charges from its implement as described in Steal Magic, except the DC of the skill check increases to DC 46; success returns the stolen magic to the appropriate items.

@Check[arcana|dc:46], @Check[nature|dc:46], @Check[occultism|dc:46], or @Check[religion|dc:46]

items.name: Empower Barrier
items.description:
Требования: The hazard starts its turn, and the Belimarius statue holds at least one charge

Эффект: The Belimarius statue transfers all charges from its implement into the force barrier separating the corridor from area B3. For every charge the statue transfers, the force barrier gains 10 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 hour. (If the force barrier has been destroyed, the statue instead expends the first charge to cast a 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Iela4GgVeO3LfAo], with any remaining charges granting the barrier temporary Hit Points.) Charges transferred to the force barrier are lost forever and can't be returned to items they were stolen from.

Czaresia.name: Czaresia
Czaresia.description:
Рунные гиганты — тираны среди себе подобных, наделенные властью повелевать и магически управлять другими гигантами. Когда-то они служили еще более могущественным хозяевам — могущественным волшебникам, известным как рунные лорды, и при этом командовали целыми армиями гигантов, служивших империи рунных владык.

В течение веков после распада этих империй рунные гиганты сохранились как самостоятельный народ, хотя для внешнего мира они не более чем сказочные ужасы, о которых поздними ночами шепчутся суеверные гиганты. Рунные гиганты обычно обитают в самых отдаленных и труднопроходимых горных массивах, но их также можно встретить в огромных руинах на вершинах затерянных островов, в ледниковых долинах или еще более отдаленных или магических регионах.

Поразительная угольная плоть рунных гигантов украшена десятками рун, которые являются мощным проявлением их мистической силы. Рунные гиганты — это огромные существа, в среднем высотой @Unit[Foot|40]{40 футов} и весом @Unit[Pound|25000]{25,000 фунтов}.

Гиганты — массивные гуманоидные существа, которые живут в отдалённых регионах по всему миру. Они сильно отличаются друг от друга, но их объединяет голод: им требуется питаться их стихией в количествах, которое можно ожидать от таких массивных гуманоидов. Хотя для некоторых гигантов это простое дело, более эзотерические типы находят эту потребность суровой реальностью. Если морозного гиганта удовлетворит огромный кусок льда или снега, то теневые гиганты жаждут свернувшихся теней Незримого Мира.

items.name: Эффект заклинания: Полёт
items.description:
Предоставляется заклинанием @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]

Цель может парить в воздухе, получая Скорость полёта, равную её Скорости или 20 футам, в зависимости от того, что больше.

items.name: Реагирующий удар (особый)
items.description:
Рунный гигант получает дополнительную реакцию в начале каждого своего хода, которую может использовать только на "Реагирующий удар".

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

items.name: Команда гигантам
items.description: When Czaresia casts a mental spell against another giant, the DC is 41, rather than 37.

items.name: Требование
items.description: Когда рунный гигант творит свое врождённое @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R9xqCBblkS5KE4y7]{Послание}, то еще может сотворить на эту цель @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.qwlh6aDgi86U3Q7H]{Внушение}.

items.name: Вспыхивающие руны
items.description:
Триггер: Рунный гигант использует @Trait[Arcane]{арканное} умение или творит @Trait[Arcane]{арканное} заклинание

Эффект: The runes on the giant's body flash with magical energy. Each creature within a @Template[emanation|distance:10] must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Ослеплено} на 1 раунд.

Провал: Существо получает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Слепоту} на 1 раунд.

items.name: Воззвание к руне
items.description:
The rune giant invokes one of the runes on their body, causing the rune to spray forth a @Template[cone|distance:30] of sparks that deals @Damage[6d12[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in the cone (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect] save).

The giant can't use Invoke Rune again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Invoke Rune]]{1d4 rounds}.

A glowing copy of the invoked rune appears on a single weapon the giant holds, granting the weapon one effect listed below of the giant's choice. The effect on the weapon lasts for 1 minute. If the giant places a new rune on a weapon, any previously placed rune immediately vanishes, ending its effect.

Rune of Pride: (emotion, fear, mental) A creature struck by the weapon becomes convinced they fight an unconquerable foe. The creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}. On a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and can't take hostile actions against Czaresia for as long as they remain frightened.

items.name: Широкий замах
items.description: Czaresia makes a single mace Strike and compares the attack roll result to the ACs of up to two foes within her reach. This counts as two attacks for Czaresia's multiple attack penalty.

items.name: Мифическая устойчивость [Воля]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Trinity Star
items.description: When Dream Aethusa dies, a field of iridescent energy envelops her lifeless body (and her gear) for 10 minutes. During this time, any creature that touches Dream Aethusa's body takes @Damage[9d6[force]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:37|basic] save). After 10 minutes have passed, Aethusa's body rises into the air and is consumed by mythic energy, transforming into the Trinity Star hazard.

items.name: Мифическая сила
items.description: У существа есть запас из 3 Очков Мифа, и оно может потратить эти Очки Мифа на любое из своих действий.

items.name: Ускоренное колдовство
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: If Dream Aethusa's next action is to cast a cantrip or a spell that is 6th-rank or lower, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

items.name: Перезарядка
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: Dream Aethusa regains an expended spell.

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: Dream Aethusa ends one condition affecting her.

items.name: Стойкое колдовство
items.description: If a reaction would disrupt Dream Aethusa's spellcasting action, she attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. On a success, the action isn't disrupted.

Earthfall.name: Earthfall
Earthfall.disable: @Check[ocean-lore|dc:42] (expert) or @Check[nature|dc:45] (master) or Survival (master) to chart the flood paths of the coming waves, @Check[crafting|dc:50] (legendary) to reinforce a shelter
Earthfall.routine:
(5 minutes) Only the first five minutes of this disaster directly impact the PCs, but during that time, they must contend with the combination of a megatsunami and meteor shower.

Meteor Shower: As meteor shower, but @Damage[7d10[bludgeoning]] damage and @Damage[15d6[fire]] damage to all characters (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic] save). If at least half the PCs succeeded at Prepare checks, only one randomly determined PC is affected by the meteor shower rather than the whole party.

Tsunami: If at least half the PCs succeed on Prepare checks, they avoid all effects of the megatsunami until the last minute, at which point they're affected as if they were unprepared. Many of Xin-Bakrakhan's citizens are powerful wizards or otherwise have access to flight, be it by spell, wings, or flying minions, but their retreat into the skies above is chaotic. A PC capable of flight (or who is carried aloft by a flying ally) for an entire minute can avoid the tsunami's effects if they succeed at a @Check[acrobatics|dc:35] check to Maneuver in Flight to avoid mid-air collisions with others or falling meteors—on a failure they're forced back into the dangerous waters below and take a –2 circumstance penalty to saves against the tsunami's effects.

The tsunami floods into the lowest elevation area on the 2nd minute, then proceeds up into the higher regions as shown on the map on each of the following minutes. A PC in the area is affected as the standard megatsunami, but @Damage[(6d12+35)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic] save) when they're first struck and then @Damage[(4d12+25)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic]) each minute they're carried along by the wave.
Earthfall.stealth: @Check[astronomy-lore|dc:42] (master) or @Check[nature|dc:45] (legendary) to chart the meteor's trajectory, @Check[society|dc:50] (master) to recall information on Xin-Bakrakhan and how it was destroyed during Earthfall

Echoes of the End.name: Echoes of the End
Echoes of the End.descriptionHazard: An overwhelming trumpeting fills the area as the apocalypse seed vibrates and shakes off the encrusted bone that's accreted around it to reveal a large tooth fragment from some immense monster.
Echoes of the End.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:50] (master), @Check[occultism|dc:50] (legendary), or @Check[religion|dc:50] (legendary) to recognize and shore up the area against the localized planar instability causing a connection between the apocalypse seed and Jandelay, or @Check[athletics|dc:53] (legendary) to grasp the apocalypse seed and muffle its vibrations with your embrace. Four successes are needed to muffle the aura enough against the planar instability and end the hazard.
Echoes of the End.reset: The apocalypse seed creates another area of instability after 24 hours.
Echoes of the End.routine:
(1 action) Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:44] save. A creature with the slowed condition from this hazard takes a –2 penalty to this save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: The creature takes @Damage[(2d10+10)[sonic]] damage.

Провал: The creature takes @Damage[(4d10+20)[sonic]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the start of the hazard's next turn.

Критический провал: The creature takes @Damage[(8d10+40)[sonic]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 round.
Echoes of the End.stealth: (legendary) to notice the low vibration forming in the area surrounding the apocalypse seed; noticing the apocalypse seed itself has a DC of 0

items.name: Oliphaunt's Echo
items.description:
Триггер: A living creature enters area C6

Эффект: Pent-up magical energy from another world begins to release in waves of overwhelming sound. The hazard rolls initiative.

Elder Shantak.name: Elder Shantak
Elder Shantak.description:
Внушительные шантаки гораздо более разумны, чем можно было бы предположить по их звериному облику. Они умеют говорить, хотя их голоса звучат как скрежет стекла по камню, и не могут изъясняться ни на одном языке, кроме Акло.

Способность шантаков перемещаться по космическим просторам со сверхъестественной скоростью позволяет им гнездиться на многочисленных мирах, но, несмотря на такую мобильность, большинство шантаков не желают искать себе новое жилище, если только у них нет другого выхода. Вместо этого они селятся в заброшенных руинах или на дрейфующих в космосе астероидах, выходя на поверхность планет выбранной ими звездной системы только тогда, когда их заставляет желание подкрепиться.

Несмотря на то, что они не являются обитателями Измерения Снов, их часто можно встретить в этом мире. Способность к космическим полетам позволяет им быстро перемещаться между Ленгом и более гостеприимными районами Измерения Снов, поэтому они особенно востребованы в качестве скакунов у тех, кто имеет дела в дальних уголках сновидения.

Убедить шантака стать верховым животным, как известно, непросто. Они отказываются от любого обучения, и даже если их удается убедить переправить гуманоида на своей спине, они могут быть упрямыми и непостоянными. Тот, кто полагается на шантака, должен иметь наготове запасной план на случай, если шантан выбросит своего пассажира на астероид или чужую планету после каких-то разногласий.

Несмотря на то, что шантак размером почти со слона, многие из них испытывают иррациональный страх перед некоторыми существами. В частности, их пугают полуночники, а другие шантаки убегают от гарпий и гаргулий. Несмотря на то, что все эти родословные имеют одну и ту же черту, шантаки боятся не всех видов крылатых гуманоидов, что делает происхождение их фобии еще более загадочным. Шантаки на Голарионе обычно прячутся в отдаленных местах, поскольку некоторые из тех существ, которых они боятся, встречаются на планете в изобилии.

items.name: Не дышит
items.description: The elder shantak doesn't breathe and is immune to effects that require breathing (such as inhaled poison).

items.name: Скользкий
items.description: The elder shantak's scales are slimy, granting it a +3 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]. A creature mounted on a shantak takes double the normal circumstance penalty to its Reflex saves (–4 instead of –2 in most cases) while mounted.

items.name: Удары в полёте
items.description: The elder shantak Flies up to their fly speed and makes two claw Strikes at any point during it's movement. Each Strike must target a different creature. The attacks take the normal multiple attack penalty.

items.name: Screech
items.description: The shantak's screech deals @Damage[15d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] (@Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic] save). A creature that fails the save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} on a critical failure). The shantak can't use Screech again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Screech]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Share Defenses
items.description:
Триггер: A creature is riding the shantak

Эффект: The shantak extends their no breath ability and cold resistance to a single creature riding them. They can withdraw this protection as a free action.
