items.description:
Триггер: The door to area B11 is opened or a creature enters the area, or any open flame is brought into area B11

Эффект: The musky fog filling the perfume laboratory billows out into the hall, spreading 5 feet from the doorway and expanding by another 5 feet each round the door remains open. All creatures within the fog become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W], and all creatures outside the fog become concealed to creatures within it. Creatures in the fog must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:45|traits:poison|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure); this is a poison effect. If the pungent cloud was triggered by open flame, chemicals in the air ignite into a flash of fire, dealing @Damage[6d6[fire],6d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in the area (@Check[reflex|dc:45|basic|options:area-effect] save), after which the pungent cloud disperses. The hazard then rolls initiative.

Maze-Weaver.name: Maze-Weaver
Maze-Weaver.description: Чудовищные, раздутые пауки из продуваемого всеми ветрами Ленга строят жуткие, опасные логова с помощью магически принужденных рабов. У ленгских пауков от пяти до 13 ног, но всегда нечётное количество.
Maze-Weaver.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Interdimensional Web Sense
items.description: The maze-weaver senses when a creature touches its webs, even if it is on another plane of existence. While touching its webs, the maze-weaver has precise tremorsense to detect the vibrations of creatures touching its webs.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Создать оружие из паутины
items.description: Ленгский паук создаёт оружие, прикрепляя шнур из паутины к тяжёлым предметам, таким как камни или куски металла, либо соединяя два тяжелых предмета вместе, чтобы создать болу, либо прикрепляя один к своей ноге, чтобы создать боевой цеп.

items.name: Спуск на паутине
items.description:
Ленгский паук двигается строго вниз на расстояние вплоть до 120 футов, удерживаемый нитью паутины. Он может висеть на паутине или отцепиться от нее. Расстояние, которое он "Спускается на паутине" не считается для урона от падения.

Существо может "Ударом" рассечь паутину (КБ 30, Твёрдость 15, 25 ОЗ), из-за чего ленгский паук падает.

items.name: Разложить ловушку из паутины
items.description:
Частота: 3 раза в день

Эффект: Ленгский паук плетет паутину в радиусе 20 футов от себя, чтобы создать @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TFnr9Gq7VXPJu0GQ], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.a2XaerM1KkPyLIPM] или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.XU8u9F3uoesGDjgM]. Паутина ленгского паука даёт ему всё необходимое сырьё. Все спасброски и КС, чтобы [[/act escape dc=36]]{Вырваться}, связанные с ловушками из паутины, используют КС Ремесла для ловушек ленгского паука. Ловушка из паутины распадается через 24 часа.

items.name: Яд ленгского паука
items.description:
Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:33]

Макс.продолжительность: 6 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[2d6[poison]] и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 1} (1 раунд)

Стадия 2: @Damage[2d6[poison]], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательство} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 2} (1 минута); эффект @Condition[Confused]{замешательства} обладает признаками @Trait[Emotion]{эмоция} и @Trait[Mental]{ментальный}.

items.name: Дистанционное опрокидывание
items.description: Ленгский паук может использовать бола из паутины, чтобы @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Опрокинуть} цель проверкой Атлетики. Эта проверка имеет штраф обстоятельства −2. Бола из паутины не наносит урона, когда используется, чтобы "Опрокинуть".

items.name: Web Step
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: The maze-weaver teleports to a space containing its webs, even if it is on another plane of existence.

Megatsunami.name: Megatsunami
Megatsunami.descriptionHazard: A tsunami can be a devastating disaster but pales in comparison to the daunting wall of water created by a megatsunami. When a megatsunami begins, ocean water often recedes far away from the shore, much more dramatically than it would during low tide. This warning sign might occur only seconds or minutes before the full force of the megatsunami crashes onto the land in the form of a wave whose height can exceed a hundred feet.
Megatsunami.disable: @Check[ocean-lore|dc:36] (expert) or @Check[nature|dc:38] or @Check[survival|dc:38] (master) to chart the flood path, @Check[crafting|dc:38] (master) to reinforce a shelter, or @Check[athletics|dc:40] (expert) to quickly ferry people or supplies to higher ground,
Megatsunami.routine:
(5+ minutes, @Check[flat|dc:18]) The megatsunami's wave overtakes and crushes everything in its path. It rips buildings off their foundations and tears up trees by their roots. Prepared creatures have managed to reach an area of high ground or another form of safety, but unprepared creatures in the area are caught up in the flood and battered by a combination of water and debris.

Unprepared creatures take @Damage[(5d12+30)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:43|basic] save) when the megatsunami hits and are thereafter surrounded by water. If they can't breathe water, they must hold their breath or begin to drown. Each round, a creature can attempt a @Check[athletics|dc:40] check to Swim up near the surface or to keep their head above water for the remainder of the minute once they reach the surface.

At the start of the next four minutes, the megatsunami has carried each unprepared character 250 feet inland. At this time, each unprepared character takes @Damage[(3d12+20)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] save). A character who managed that minute to remain near the surface gains a result one degree of success better than their actual rolled result, with a critical success indicating they've managed to clamber out of the surge onto high ground and are now prepared.

At the end of the five minutes, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:18] to determine if a new wave repeats the routine. Characters already swept inland only become affected by these following waves once the rushing water reaches them, but until then they can Swim in the choppy floodwaters with a successful @Check[athletics|dc:30] check, potentially reaching safety or high ground before the next wave hits. Once a region is flooded by a megatsunami, it typically remains flooded for several hours.
Megatsunami.stealth: @Check[ocean-lore|dc:36] (expert), @Check[nature|dc:38] (expert), or @Check[survival|dc:40] (master) to notice anomalies in wave patterns

Meteor Shower.name: Meteor Shower
Meteor Shower.descriptionHazard: Impact from a sufficiently large asteroid would be powerful enough to wipe out a region or destroy a planet, but smaller-scale impact events, like from a meteor shower, present hazards that could be survived. This shower might arise naturally, or it might be the result of the PCs or other forces preventing a greater calamity by breaking a world-rending asteroid into smaller pieces.
Meteor Shower.disable: @Check[astronomy-lore|dc:40] (master) or @Check[nature|dc:50] (legendary) to predict the trajectory of the falling asteroids and determine safe zones, @Check[athletics|dc:45] (legendary) or @Check[crafting|dc:47] (master) to dig underground shelters, @Check[diplomacy|dc:45] (master) or @Check[intimidation|dc:47] (master) to coordinate an orderly evacuation
Meteor Shower.routine: (1+ minutes, @Check[flat|dc:17]) Small asteroids rain down across the sky, battering and incinerating those caught in their path before carving craters. Over the course of a minute, enough asteroids smash into the ground and explode to inflict @Damage[6d10[bludgeoning],14d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to any unprepared characters in the area (@Check[reflex|dc:44|basic] save). The @Template[type:burst|distance:40]{40-foot-radius} craters left behind are greater difficult terrain.
Meteor Shower.stealth: @Check[astronomy-lore|dc:41] (master) or @Check[nature|dc:45] (legendary) to notice signs of the approach of unusual celestial bodies

Meteor Shower (Escalation).name: Meteor Shower (Escalation)
Meteor Shower (Escalation).descriptionHazard: Impact from a sufficiently large asteroid would be powerful enough to wipe out a region or destroy a planet, but smaller-scale impact events, like from a meteor shower, present hazards that could be survived. This shower might arise naturally, or it might be the result of the PCs or other forces preventing a greater calamity by breaking a world-rending asteroid into smaller pieces.
Meteor Shower (Escalation).disable: @Check[astronomy-lore|dc:40] (master) or @Check[nature|dc:50] (legendary) to predict the trajectory of the falling asteroids and determine safe zones, @Check[athletics|dc:45] (legendary) or @Check[crafting|dc:47] (master) to dig underground shelters, @Check[diplomacy|dc:45] (master) or @Check[intimidation|dc:47] (master) to coordinate an orderly evacuation
Meteor Shower (Escalation).routine:
(1+ minutes, @Check[flat|dc:17]) Small asteroids rain down across the sky, battering and incinerating those caught in their path before carving craters. Over the course of a minute, enough asteroids smash into the ground and explode to inflict @Damage[7d10[bludgeoning],14d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to any unprepared characters in the area (@Check[reflex|dc:46|basic] save). The @Template[type:burst|distance:40]{40-foot-radius} craters left behind are greater difficult terrain.

The material raining down from outer space includes chunks of adamantine. Adamantine's ability to break through the Hardness of materials is particularly lethal at terminal velocity. The falling adamantine has Hardness 20, allowing the asteroid's bludgeoning damage to overcome the Hardness of all materials with less Hardness, including shelters that would otherwise provide cover. Cover that's destroyed by the bludgeoning damage provides no protection against the fire damage.
Meteor Shower (Escalation).stealth: @Check[astronomy-lore|dc:41] (master) or @Check[nature|dc:45] (legendary) to notice signs of the approach of unusual celestial bodies

Mirror of Glory.name: Mirror of Glory
Mirror of Glory.descriptionHazard: A reflective field of energy fills a large archway in a gatehouse, in which viewers regard themselves dressed in fine clothes, bowing down before Runelord Xanderghul.
Mirror of Glory.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:37] (master) to disrupt one of the six anchor points that link the paradigm cube to the mirror, @Check[arcana|dc:34] (legendary) to use knowledge of magic that opposes pride to unravel the mirror's power, @Check[intimidation|dc:37] (master) to use one's force of personality to stand against the arrogance amplified by the mirror, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (8th-rank; counteract DC 36) to counteract one of the six faces of the paradigm cube; six successes are required to disable the Mirror of Glory
Mirror of Glory.routine:
(6 actions) On its turn, the Mirror of Glory targets random PCs in the area with distortions of their reality, spending an action to target one PC. If it has actions remaining after targeting the PCs, it spends any remaining actions repairing damage done to itself at the rate of 25 HP restored per action spent. If the mirror hasn't been damaged, then these unused actions are lost. Each time the Mirror of Glory targets a PC with a distortion, roll 1d6 and consult the entries below to determine what the PC experiences and any subsequent effects. The trap loses one action for each successful check made to disable it, but this doesn't reduce the number of distortions it's capable of creating. When a PC experiences a distortion, they take @Damage[10d6[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:37|basic] save), but on a failed saving throw, the PC suffers that distortion's additional effect.

1—Beauty: The PC regards Xanderghul as the most attractive figure they've ever seen. Additional effect: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

2—Cruelty: The PC sees Xanderghul as a demonic figure capable of unimaginable cruelty, who lashes out at the PC with dozens of blades and poisoned needles meant to carve away their strength. Additional effect: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 24 hours.

3—Disappointment: To the PC, Xanderghul suddenly seems to be an intimidating parental figure, commanding officer, or other person with authority whose disapproval induces tremors of nervousness. Additional effect: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 24 hours.

4—Jealousy: The PC watches as a glorious plume of peacock tail feathers spreads behind Xanderghul, filling them with jealousy and potentially driving them to lash out unpredictably against their allies in hopes of becoming the only one worthy of Xanderghul's attention. Additional effect: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] for 1 round. 5—Despair: The PC feels their own flesh rotting away as they realize the Xanderghul who stands before them exists outside of the laws of time. Additional effect: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

6—Worship: The PC is filled with the conviction that Xanderghul is the one true god and feels the urge to pray to him for absolution. Additional effect: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}.
Mirror of Glory.stealth: (master) to notice the reflective field is dangerous; noticing the field has a DC of 0

items.name: Bow Before Your God
items.description:
Триггер: A creature touches the mirror or Seeks the reflection while being adjacent to the mirror

Эффект: The image of Xanderghul that appears behind the reflected PCs spreads his arms wide in glory, transforming the world presented in the reflection. Each PC reflected in the mirror (regardless of whether they're looking at the reflection or not) must attempt a @Check[will|dc:37] save to avoid being compelled to drop to their knees before Xanderghul's glory—on a failure, the PC becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60], and the feelings of inferiority cause them to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 24 hours. The trap then rolls initiative.

Misery Siktempora.name: Сиктемпора страдания
Misery Siktempora.description:
Безрукие и шестиногие сиктемпоры страдания — существа, рожденные от сильной боли и страданий, одни из самых многочисленных в своем роде, поскольку страдание — это такой же вездесущий опыт, как и жизнь. Они также являются самыми активными сиктемпорами, стремящимися распространить страдания, из которых они рождаются. Они радуются возможности отправиться во Вселенную, где страдания так ужасно распространены и легко приумножаются.

В Измерении Времени сильные эмоции — это не просто бесплотные ощущения. Они накапливаются с течением времени, от таких вещей, как критическая масса эмоций, вызванная историческим событием или поселение, передающее сильные чувства из поколения в поколение. Эти накопления в конечном итоге приводят к рождению сиктемпор. Каждая сиктемпора всем своим существом ощущает отдельную сильную эмоцию, связанную с породившими ее обстоятельствами. Редкие сиктемпоры возникают, когда эмоционально озабоченное существо пытается отправиться в Измерение Времени или вмешивается в течение времени, что может создавать парадоксы или манипулировать прошлыми событиями.

Сиктемпоры обычно изолируются в Измерении Времени в пространствах разума, пронизанных эмоциями, которые их породили, но некоторые путешествуют на другие планы. Эти скитальцы жаждут побаловать себя более сильными эмоциями или породить ещё больше таких чувств, тем самым увековечивая свой род.
Misery Siktempora.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке), телепатия 300 футов
Misery Siktempora.hp: регенерация 40 (отключается от ментального, орихалка или жизненности)

items.name: Чувство темпоральности
items.description: Сиктемпора всегда может бросить Знания Измерения Времени для инициативы. При этом он получает бонус обстоятельства +2 к этому броску.

items.name: Регенерация 40 (отключается от ментального, орихалка или жизненности)
Разрубить страдание
items.description: Существа с @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательством} или @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Одурманенностью} становятся @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Застигнуты врасплох} для сиктемпоры страдания.

items.name: Сверхъестественный наскок
items.description:
Триггер: Сиктемпора страдания бросает Знания Измерения Времени для инициативы

Эффект: Сиктемпора страдания "Перемещается" и наносит "Удар" когтем, в любом порядке.

items.name: Навлечь страдания
items.description:
Требования: Последним действием сиктемпоры страдания был "Удар" когтем, нанёсший урон цели

Эффект: Сиктемпора страдания наполняет мысли цели отчаянием. Цель должна совершить спасбросок @Check[will|dc:32|options:inflicts:clumsy,inflicts:enfeebled,inflicts:stupefied]{Воли}. Независимо от результата, цель временно иммунна к "Навлечь страдания" на 1 минуту.

Успех: Цель невредима.

Провал: Цель @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Неуклюжа 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблена 2} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Одурманена 2} на 1 раунд.

Критический провал: Как провал, но на 1 минуту.

items.name: Телепатический вой
items.description:
Сиктемпора страдания атакует разум одного существа в радиусе 100 футов воплем страдания и мучений, наносящим @Damage[8d6[mental]] (простой спасбросок @Check[will|dc:32|basic|options:inflicts:confused]{Воли}).

Если спасбросок провален, цель также оказывается в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательстве} для первого действия своего следующего хода (или на 1 раунд при критическом провале).

Natbakh.name: Natbakh
Natbakh.description:
Natbakhs are native to the peaks and subterranean caverns of the windswept dimension of Leng and haunt the dark skies of that nightmare realm.

Nightmare Eruptions

In places where the boundaries between Golarion and Leng are thin, such as the depths of the Kodar Mountains, natbakhs have a particularly horrifying method of entering the waking world. If they consume the dreaming persona of someone sleeping near such thin places, they can burst forth from that sleeper's body, killing them in life as well as in their dream, often leaving the now-dead dreamer's home in splinters before flying off to build a lair in the mountains. Such "nightmare eruptions" are rare, but it doesn't take many natbakhs to leave a mark in a region unprepared for their arrival.
Natbakh.language: не может говорить ни на одном языке

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The natbakh ends one condition affecting them.

items.name: Мифическая устойчивость [Рефлекс]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Drain Dreams
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Требования: The natbakh's previous action was a successful jaws Strike that damaged a creature

Эффект: The natbakh's suckered tongue latches on. The creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:34] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure) for 1 week as their dreams are slurped away. If the creature becomes stupefied in this way, the natbakh regains @Damage[32[healing]] HP. Draining dreams from a creature that's already stupefied doesn't restore any HP, but increases the victim's stupefied value by 1, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 5}.

items.name: Мифическая сила
items.description: У существа есть запас из 3 Очков Мифа, и оно может потратить эти Очки Мифа на любое из своих действий.

items.name: Мифический навык
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The natbakh attempts its next Athletics or Stealth skill check with a +4 bonus and is considered to have mythic proficiency for that check.

items.name: Nightmare Screech
items.description:
The natbakh shrieks in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that echoes more in the minds of those in the area than in the ears. Those in the area recall shrieks like this in forgotten nightmares, and the memories of wounds suffered in dreams cause nauseating pain. Creatures in the area take @Damage[10d8[mental]|options:area-damage] damage and must attempt a @Check[will|dc:34] save. The natbakh can't use Nightmare Screech again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Nightmare Screech]]{1d4 rounds}.

Критический успех: Существо не получает урона.

Успех: Существо получает половину урона и испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 1}.

Провал: The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}

Критический провал: The creature takes double damage, is sickened 2, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for as long as they remain sickened (or 1 minute, whichever comes first).

items.name: Writhing Clutches
items.description: A natbakh can Fly at half Speed while it has a Huge or smaller creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM], or at full speed when it has a Medium or smaller creature grabbed or restrained, carrying that creature along with it.

Nightmare Feast.name: Nightmare Feast
Nightmare Feast.descriptionHazard: The consumption of sentient, and even sapient creatures is widespread in Leng. Those who suffer such fates are as much the genesis of this nightmare as those who partake, and as such, this nightmare tends to manifest in places where meals were taken, from banquet halls to campsites.
Nightmare Feast.disable: @Check[society|dc:43] (master) to fight these destructive urges by focusing your thoughts on traditions not so steeped in cruelty, or @Check[intimidation|dc:40] (legendary) to overwhelm the nightmare's influence with the strength of your own personality; three successes are required to disable the nightmare
Nightmare Feast.reset: The nightmare deactivates as soon as a round begins with no creatures in its area, and resets in [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds}.
Nightmare Feast.routine:
(1 action) The nightmare transitions from directly chewing on the creatures in the area to compelling them to feed for themselves. Each round on the nightmare's turn, all creatures within 30 feet of the nightmare's epicenter must attempt a @Check[will|dc:36] save with the following results.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: The nightmare causes a momentary change to the creature's appearance, causing its jaws to take on a frightening, fanged appearance and filling the creature's mind with distracting, unsettling hunger that cause them to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] until the start of the nightmare feast's next turn.

Провал: The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] until the start of the nightmare feast's next turn and gains a +30 bite (magical) that deals @Damage[(3d12+10)[slashing]] damage plus @Damage[2d6[persistent,bleed]] damage on a hit. The creature favors this bite Strike when the confusion drives them to attack.

Критический провал: As failure, but the creature also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl] and can use the extra action to make bite Strikes.

items.name: Invisible Feasters
items.description:
Триггер: A living creature approaches within 10 feet of the remains of a previous feast

Эффект: Invisible attackers begin to bite and gnaw at the triggering creature and any other creatures within 30 feet. The creatures take @Damage[10d6[slashing]] damage from the biting (@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic] save), and then the nightmare rolls initiative.

Peacock Phoenix.name: Peacock Phoenix
Peacock Phoenix.description:
Unlike its namesake, the peacock phoenix is a being of pure magic, a unique manifestation of Xanderghul's alter ego as the Peacock Spirit.

Other Mythic Phoenixes

Because it's tied so intrinsically to Runelord Xanderghul and his alter ego, the Peacock Spirit, once the peacock phoenix is destroyed, it's doubtful Golarion will ever see its like again. Whether different kinds of mythic phoenixes, born from similar confluences of magical and psychic energy, could ever exist remains uncertain.
Peacock Phoenix.senses: волночувствительность (неточное) 60 футов; обнаружение мировоззрения, обнаружение магии
Peacock Phoenix.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: Существо завершает одно действующее на него состояние.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Мифическая устойчивость [Рефлекс]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Radiant Panoply
items.description: 20 feet. The peacock phoenix is surrounded by an aura of iridescence. An adjacent creature that starts its turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:35|options:area-effect,inflicts:dazzled] save. On a failure, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh] until the start of its next turn.

items.name: Rebirth
items.description: When the peacock phoenix dies while incorporeal, they return to life at the start of their next turn with full Hit Points. They are no longer incorporeal, lose the spirit trait, gain the beast trait, and lose their immunities and resistances (except for mythic resistance) and radiant panoply. Their Strength modifier becomes +7. They lose their radiant wing Strike and gain a beak and talon Strike.

items.name: Мифическая сила
items.description: У существа есть запас из 3 Очков Мифа, и оно может потратить эти Очки Мифа на любое из своих действий.

items.name: Мифический навык
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The phoenix attempts their next Athletics or Stealth skill check with a +4 bonus and has mythic proficiency for that check.

items.name: Сияющий луч
items.description: The phoenix emits a @Template[type:line|distance:100] of radiance from their eyes. Creatures in the area take @Damage[10d12[force]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic] save). The phoenix peacock can't use Radiant Beam again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiant Beam]]{1d4 rounds}.

Phantom of Desire.name: Phantom of Desire
Phantom of Desire.description: A rumor can become so vivid and so persistent that it comes to life, creating a brainchild-a living illusion that hatches from an intense belief in a remorseless and implacable killer. Often, these rumors swirl around the victims of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlcrVRqW1MSKJ5IC] spell. A brainchild's capabilities grow when they pursue a believer but deflate against skeptics, making them only as bad as one thinks they are. A simple drive to stalk, terrify, and kill propels a brainchild, but the creature might also exhibit other behaviors ascribed to them through gossip.

items.name: Универсальный язык
items.description: Anything spoken by the phantom of desire is perceived by the listener in its native language.

items.name: Urban Legend
items.description:
This phantom is a manifestation of the pernicious rumors throughout the Inner Sea region that Sorshen is hiding her true intentions as ruler of New Thassilon and is biding her time for a chance to reveal her true motives to the world once she's lulled everyone into a false sense of security. A PC who Seeks or Senses Motive on a phantom of desire with a @Check[perception|dc:44] check realizes that the phantom of desire doesn't actually do additional bleed damage with her strikes, doesn't have her Enticing Charade ability, and doesn't have any innate spells at all. Unlike the typical brainchild, phantoms of desire are fully created by the animus of longing; they do not possess the typical Persistence of Memory ability most brainchildren have.

A brainchild is sustained only by the reputation that precedes them. Mindless creatures are immune to a brainchild and can't perceive them.

The brainchild's size, features, and items, as well as the appearance of their attacks, match what the foes perceiving them expect. If foes expect to see different things, the brainchild chooses which to manifest. If any creature that can perceive the brainchild believes the brainchild has one of the abilities below, the brainchild has that ability.

A creature can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw] (against the brainchild's Deception DC) to attempt to disbelieve an individual ability. If at any point no creature perceiving the brainchild believes in the ability, the brainchild loses that ability immediately. If foes expect different particulars, such as one believing the brainchild is immune to fire and another believing they're immune to divinations, the brainchild chooses one to have.

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.j2wsK6IsW5yMW1jW]: (неточное) 100 футов
  • Иммунитет: to one damage type, magic school, or condition
  • Слабость: 10 to one damage type other than mental
  • Сопротивление: 10 to physical damage, with an exception for either cold iron or silver
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.etMnv73EIdEZrYYu]: (aura, emotion, fear, mental) 100 feet, DC 28
  • [[/r 1d6]]{1d6} Extra Damage: on Strikes, of a type one foe believes in
  • Additional Spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R8bqnYiThB6MYTxD] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IqJ9URobmJ9L9UBG] at 6th rank

items.name: Delusional Aspiration
items.description: When a phantom of desire hits a creature with an intrusive thought Strike, the creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:38] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}.

items.name: Enticing Charade
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: The phantom telepathically reaches into the mind of another creature, offering to make their dreams come true. The target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:40] save to avoid becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} by the distraction (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} on a critical failure) until the start of the phantom's next turn.

Pridespawn Sentinel.name: Pridespawn Sentinel
Pridespawn Sentinel.description:
Порождения греха были созданы одним из семи древних волшебников, известных как рунные лорды, каждый из которых воплотил в себе один из семи грехов. Первое порождение греха создал Рунный Лорд Гнева, использовав технику, которая впоследствии повлияла на практику искривления плоти. Вскоре техника создания порождений греха попала в руки других рунных лордов, и хотя каждый из них пытался создать свои собственные варианты, сегодня порождения греха остаются самыми многочисленными и печально известными в своем роде.

Имея лишь смутное сходство с гуманоидами, из чьей плоти порождения греха были созданы, как правило, они выглядят ужасающе истощенным, и у него неестественно длинные руки и ноги, каждая из которых состоит из трио корявых когтистых пальцев. По телу порождения греха расходятся вены в виде кровавых узоров, подозрительно напоминающие витые руны, а их плоть бледна и безволоса. Их головы вытянуты, с прорезями для носа, красными глазами и тревожными нижними челюстями, которые разделяются пополам у подбородка, открывая педипальпы, заканчивающиеся крошечными трехпалыми руками и обрамляющие длинный висячий язык.

Порождения греха примерно @Unit[Foot|6.5]{6,5 футов} в высоту, а вес как у истощенного человека того же размера. Они ведут себя в соответствии со связанным с ними грехом и обладают физическими характеристиками, намекающими на эти качества. Например в жилах порождения жадности течет золото, а порождения зависти выглядят еще более худыми, чем остальные их сородичи.
Pridespawn Sentinel.allSaves: бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии, бонус состояния +4 ко всем спасброскам от ментальных

items.name: Нюх на грех (неточное) 30 футов
items.description:
Порождение греха имеет нюх на существ, отражающих этот грех, как способность нюха. Мастер определяет, какие существа являются достаточно греховными.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Scent]

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Бонус состояния +4 ко всем спасброскам от ментальных
Hallucinatory Backlash
items.description:
Триггер: The pridespawn takes damage from a creature's weapon Strike

Эффект: The pridespawn rebuffs the arrogance of the foe that harmed it and scoffs at the attack. The triggering creature hallucinates their own attack coming back at them and takes @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:32|basic] save).

items.name: False Pride
items.description:
The pridespawn sentinel stumbles back and appears frightened and intimidated by a creature within 30 feet that it can see. The targeted creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:32] save; regardless of the result, that creature is temporarily immune to False Pride for 24 hours.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: The creature becomes overconfident and careless as they believe themselves to be more intimidating than they actually are. They're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] against the next attack the pridespawn sentinel attempts against them this round.

Провал: As success, but the creature's false pride causes them to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round as they spend one of their actions posturing and bragging about their superiority. They're off-guard as long as they remain slowed.

Критический провал: Как провал, но на 1 минуту.

items.name: Греховный укус
items.description:
A creature hit by the jaws of a pridespawn sentinel must attempt a @Check[will|dc:29] save as it's assailed by arrogant thoughts.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 1}.

Провал: Существо испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 2}.

Критический провал: Существо испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 2}, и также @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Неуклюжее 1} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблено 1} на 1 минуту.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: A pridespawn sentinel deals 1d6 extra precision damage to creatures who are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg].

Pyroclastic Mukradi.name: Pyroclastic Mukradi
Pyroclastic Mukradi.description: Устрашающие подобные многоножкам существа, мукради — трёхголовые хищники с разрушительным набором способов убийства, сожжения и расчленения. По слухам существуют версии мукради, обитающие в Темноземье. Говорят, что у этого варианта мукради чёрная чешуя, а все его головы извергают черную кислотную слизь, оживающую, прежде чем быть поглощённой мукради.

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The pyroclastic mukradi ends one condition affecting them.

items.name: Мифическая устойчивость [Стойкость]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Разделённая анатомия
items.description:
Триггер: Мукради будет @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлен}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлён}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Парализован} или впадёт в @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Замешательство}

Эффект: Мукради ограничивает ослабляющий эффект определённой частью своей нервной системы, игнорируя эффект, но заставляя выбранную им пасть бездействовать на время действия эффекта. В течение этого времени пасть не может быть использована для нанесения "Удара" или "Выдыхания энергии". Это умение не может быть использовано, если все головы мукради в бездействующем состоянии.

items.name: Яростный плевок
items.description:
Триггер: Существо критически попадает по мукради

Эффект: Мукради перезаряжает "Выдыхание энергии". Он может немедленно использовать "Выдыхание энергии" в рамках этой реакции. Он не может использовать эту реакцию снова, пока не перезарядит "Выдыхание энергии" естественным образом.

items.name: Выдыхание энергии
items.description:
Мукради выдыхает взрыв энергии из одной своих трёх голов, каждое существо в области должно совершить простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:36|basic|options:area-effect]{Рефлекса}.

Мукради не может снова использовать "Выдыхание энергии" [[/gmr 1d4 #Перезарядка выдыхания энергии]]{1d4 раунда}.

  • Дымная пасть: (@Trait[Poison]{яд}), @Template[cone|distance:60]{60-футовый конус} токсичного дыма, наносящий @Damage[16d6[poison]|options:area-damage].
  • Огненная пасть: (@Trait[Fire]{огонь}), @Template[cone|distance:60]{60-футовый конус} огня, наносящий @Damage[16d6[fire]|options:area-damage].
  • Шоковая пасть: (@Trait[Electricity]{электричество}), @Template[line|distance:120]{120-футовая линия} электричества, наносящая @Damage[16d6[electricity]|options:area-damage].

items.name: Мифическая сила
items.description: У существа есть запас из 3 Очков Мифа, и оно может потратить эти Очки Мифа на любое из своих действий.

items.name: Разорвать на части
items.description:
Мукради наносит два "Удара" разными челюстями по одной и той же цели. Если оба "Удара" попадают, цель получает дополнительные @Damage[(2d12+13)[slashing]] с простым спасброском @Check[fortitude|dc:36|basic]{Стойкости}. При критическом провале существо разорвано на части и умирает.

Штраф множественных атак мукради увеличивается только после того, как все атаки будут совершены.

items.name: Перезарядка
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The pyroclastic mukradi gains one additional use of Breathe Energy.

items.name: Молотить
items.description: Мукради наносит "Удар" по каждому существу в досягаемости. Он может нанести один "Удар" каждой из своих пастей, один хвостом, а остальные ногами. Каждая атака получает штраф обстоятельства −2 и засчитывается в штраф множественных атак мукради, но штраф не увеличивается, пока не будут совершены все атаки.

items.name: Растоптать
items.description:
Огромный или меньше, нога, простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:36|basic]{Рефлекса}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Queen Sorshen's Aid.name: Queen Sorshen's Aid
Queen Sorshen's Aid.descriptionHazard: Queen Sorshen is a beautiful Thassilonian woman wielding a shimmering guisarme. Her violet eyes are fierce and focused, but the corner of her lips twist up in a small, lopsided smile.
Queen Sorshen's Aid.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:55] to unravel the energies allowing Sorshen to continue to vex Xanderghul; 4 successes are required to disable the hazard.
Queen Sorshen's Aid.routine:
(3 actions) On her initiative each round, Sorshen can spend her three actions on any of the following options, following PC suggestions if requested. She cannot use any action from the following list more than once per round.

Aid Ally: @Glyph[Action 1] Sorshen uses her magic to empower one of the PCs, granting that PC a +4 circumstance bonus to attack rolls until the start of her next turn. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.MNITD4PrcyRCqPbK]

Dispel Pride: @Glyph[Action 1] Sorshen attempts to counteract a magic effect put in place by Xanderghul, with a counteract rank of 9th and a [[/gmr 1d20+40 #Counteract]]{+40} modifier for the roll.

Distracting Presence: @Glyph[Action 1] Sorshen uses her power to distract Xanderghul, causing him to lose his resistance to mental damage until the start of her next turn and also to attempt a @Check[will|dc:50] save with the following results.

Критический успех: Xanderghul takes no further penalty, and is temporarily immune to Distracting Presence for 24 hours.

Успех: Xanderghul is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] until the start of his turn.

Провал: Xanderghul is off-guard until the start of Sorshen's next turn.

Критический провал: As failure, but Xanderghul is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as long as he remains off-guard.

Indulgent Arcana: @Glyph[Action 1] Sorshen empowers a PC's magic, so that the next spell with the mental trait they cast before Sorshen's next turn increases its save DC and attack roll by 2 and removes the spell's incapacitation trait, if any. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.KFmJLxZAFQ2Q7C1N]

Sinuous Strike: @Glyph[Action 1] Sorshen swings her guisarme, usurping some of Xanderghul's own power to manifest an illusory duplicate that attempts a guisarme Strike against him.
Queen Sorshen's Aid.stealth: +45 for initiative; noticing her has a DC of 0

items.name: Ally of Golarion
items.description:
Триггер: Xanderghul rolls initiative

Эффект: Sorshen casts telepathy, allowing her to communicate with the PCs; she can inform them of her options during her routine and follows their advice and requests if given. She then rolls initiative.

Quoroc.name: Quoroc
Quoroc.description:
Giant octopuses are found in the heart of deep, dark oceans. Clever and adaptable, they hunt and devour all manner of animals. Despite growing up to 16 feet long, a giant octopus can compress its body to squeeze through small gaps as long as there's room for its beak.

Giant octopuses favor shipwrecks, coral reefs, or underwater caverns as lairs, where they can take advantage of narrow confines for protection. Like their smaller kin, they're fond of adorning and decorating their lairs with found objects—many of which, in the giant octopus's case, are also magical weapons, shields, or works of art salvaged from sunken ships or fallen adventurers.

items.name: Сжатие
items.description: A giant octopus can move through a gap at least 2 feet wide without Squeezing, and can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt] through a gap at least 1 foot wide.

items.name: Сжимать
items.description:
@Damage[(2d10+14)[bludgeoning]], простой спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:36|basic]{Стойкости}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

items.name: Quoroc Toxin
items.description:
Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:36]

Макс.продолжительность: 6 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[3d8[poison]] и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Неуклюжесть 1} (1 раунд)

Стадия 2: @Damage[3d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 round)

Стадия 3: @Damage[3d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] 1 (1 round)

Ravenous Crypt.name: Ravenous Crypt
Ravenous Crypt.description:
When tomb robbers loot the dead, sometimes the resting places of those victims animate to avenge them. This happens most frequently when the entombed person was a particularly greedy, gluttonous, or vindictive individual in life. Other ravenous crypts arise spontaneously in places where energy from the Void flows freely into other planes.

Boneyard Guardians

Ravenous crypts are occasionally encountered in the Boneyard, roaming that vast necropolis like packs of hungry dogs, although they quickly come to heel while in Pharasma's presence. This behavior has led some scholars to posit that the constructs are created at the behest—or at least with the blessing—of the Lady of Graves. Magrim, the demigod of the dwarven afterlife, is also believed to have some connection to ravenous crypts, as suggested by the fact the pediments of many crypts are carved with the scowling visages of dwarven elders.

items.name: Броня конструкта (Твёрдость 15)
items.description: The ravenous crypt reduces any damage it takes by an amount equal to its Hardness. Once it's reduced to less than 100 Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, its construct armor breaks, removing its Hardness and reducing the crypt's Armor Class to 32.

items.name: Reduced to Rubble
items.description: When the ravenous crypt is reduced to 0 Hit Points, its space becomes an area of difficult terrain, and any creatures swallowed by the crypt fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60] in a space of their choice within the area.

items.name: Sap Strength
items.description:
A creature that takes void damage from the ravenous crypt's Swallow Whole ability must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблено 2} на 1 минуту.

Критический провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблено 3} на 1 минуту.

items.name: Spacious Stomach
items.description: A ravenous crypt has a 10-foot-space inside of it. A creature swallowed by the ravenous crypt isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei] or slowed, and the creature doesn't need to hold its breath. It can attack the ravenous crypt normally. Because it isn't grabbed, it can't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9] the crypt, but it can break free by dealing bludgeoning damage to the crypt equal to the crypt's Rupture value or by Forcing Open the crypt's doors with a successful @Check[athletics|dc:34] check.

items.name: Проглотить целиком
items.description:
Large, @Damage[5d8[void]] plus sap strength, Rupture 20

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

items.name: Молотить
items.description: Each adjacent creature and each creature swallowed by the ravenous crypt takes @Damage[5d10[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:34|basic] save). Swallowed creatures take a –2 circumstance penalty to this save. On a critical failure, a creature is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60].

Risen Runelord (Envy).name: Risen Runelord (Envy)
Risen Runelord (Envy).description:
Risen runelords are created by a powerful ritual invented by Runelord Xanderghul—a ritual called raise runelord. All risen runelords are at least level 11 creatures. Once created, a risen runelord has no capacity to become more powerful, as they are manifestations of their legacy at a specific point in time (although given enough time and resources, a risen runelord could potentially find a way to overcome this limitation on self-improvement).

A risen runelord has a modicum of free will, but as long as the one who created them via raise runelord lives, they're bound to their creator's desires. A risen runelord ordered to undertake obviously self-destructive actions might, at the GM's discretion, resist the command and could potentially even break free of their creator's control.

Since raise runelord draws upon a runelord's legacy as it exists within the Dreamlands, no risen runelord can ever sleep or dream. Xanderghul can use a risen runelord in a special way: he can use any risen runelord (including ones he didn't create) as a spare body. If he's slain, his soul can instantly jump to the closest risen runelord to replace them and continue the fight, unless the PCs can disable this defense during the second adventure in Revenge of the Runelords. Regardless of level, all risen runelords are mythic creatures and are immune to sleep effects.

Lust and Pride

Of the seven sins, lust and pride are unique among the runelords for these sins were only ever represented by a single runelord—and both still live during the events of this Adventure Path. This may change once the events of Revenge of the Runelords come to a conclusion, in which case the sinful foci for lust and pride become potential options for risen runelords of Sorshen or Xanderghul, but during Revenge of the Runelords, no risen runelords of lust or pride can exist.

Risen Runelord Gear

A risen runelord's polearm is an extension of their being and cannot exist without them, vanishing upon their death. This doesn't prevent a risen runelord from claiming, carrying, or using other items, and most higher-level risen runelords keep real magic items that remain behind after their death.

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The risen runelord ends one condition affecting them.

items.name: Beyond Life
items.description: A risen runelord may drink or eat for pleasure or entertainment, but they need not do so for nourishment and never suffer the effects of thirst or starvation.

items.name: Мифическая устойчивость [Воля]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Vanishing Death
items.description: When a risen runelord is slain, their body and (if manifested) polearm vanishes as the trapped legacy that was drawn upon to create them is set free, exploding outward in a riot of swirling color. This release of arcane energy hammers the minds of nearby creatures. All creatures adjacent to a risen runelord during their vanishing death must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:27] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 24 hours (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure) as fragments of their own memories are temporarily scrambled or hidden. Other objects carried by the risen runelord fall to the ground.

items.name: Manifest Runelord's Polearm
items.description:
Требования: The risen runelord isn't holding a runelord's polearm

Эффект: The risen runelord causes their runelord's polearm to appear in one of their hands. The exact appearance of the polearm depends on the type wielded by the runelord in life, but these weapons are purely spiritual constructs that inflict mental damage on a Strike and vanish as soon as the risen runelord releases the weapon or dies.

items.name: Мифическая сила
items.description: У существа есть запас из 3 Очков Мифа, и оно может потратить эти Очки Мифа на любое из своих действий.

items.name: Ускоренное колдовство
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: If the risen runelord's next action is to cast a cantrip or spell that's 4th-rank or lower, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

items.name: Перезарядка
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The risen runelord regains an expended spell slot or can use Quickened Casting again.

items.name: Стойкое колдовство
items.description: If a reaction would disrupt the risen runelord's spellcasting action, the risen runelord attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. On a success, the action isn't disrupted.

Risen Runelord (Gluttony).name: Risen Runelord (Gluttony)
Risen Runelord (Gluttony).description:
Risen runelords are created by a powerful ritual invented by Runelord Xanderghul—a ritual called raise runelord. All risen runelords are at least level 11 creatures. Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Vanishing Death
items.description: When a risen runelord is slain, their body and (if manifested) polearm vanishes as the trapped legacy that was drawn upon to create them is set free, exploding outward in a riot of swirling color. This release of arcane energy hammers the minds of nearby creatures. All creatures adjacent to a risen runelord during their vanishing death must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:27] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 24 hours (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure) as fragments of their own memories are temporarily scrambled or hidden. Other objects carried by the risen runelord fall to the ground.

items.name: Manifest Runelord's Polearm
items.description:
Требования: The risen runelord isn't holding a runelord's polearm

Эффект: The risen runelord causes their runelord's polearm to appear in one of their hands. The exact appearance of the polearm depends on the type wielded by the runelord in life, but these weapons are purely spiritual constructs that inflict mental damage on a Strike and vanish as soon as the risen runelord releases the weapon or dies.

items.name: Мифическая сила
items.description: У существа есть запас из 3 Очков Мифа, и оно может потратить эти Очки Мифа на любое из своих действий.

items.name: Ускоренное колдовство
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: If the risen runelord's next action is to cast a cantrip or spell that's 4th-rank or lower, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

items.name: Перезарядка
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The risen runelord regains an expended spell slot or can use Quickened Casting again.

items.name: Стойкое колдовство
items.description: If a reaction would disrupt the risen runelord's spellcasting action, the risen runelord attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. On a success, the action isn't disrupted.

Risen Runelord (Wrath).name: Risen Runelord (Wrath)
Risen Runelord (Wrath).description:
Risen runelords are created by a powerful ritual invented by Runelord Xanderghul—a ritual called raise runelord. All risen runelords are at least level 11 creatures. Once created, a risen runelord has no capacity to become more powerful, as they are manifestations of their legacy at a specific point in time (although given enough time and resources, a risen runelord could potentially find a way to overcome this limitation on self-improvement).

A risen runelord has a modicum of free will, but as long as the one who created them via raise runelord lives, they're bound to their creator's desires. A risen runelord ordered to undertake obviously self-destructive actions might, at the GM's discretion, resist the command and could potentially even break free of their creator's control.

Since raise runelord draws upon a runelord's legacy as it exists within the Dreamlands, no risen runelord can ever sleep or dream. Xanderghul can use a risen runelord in a special way: he can use any risen runelord (including ones he didn't create) as a spare body. If he's slain, his soul can instantly jump to the closest risen runelord to replace them and continue the fight, unless the PCs can disable this defense during the second adventure in Revenge of the Runelords. Regardless of level, all risen runelords are mythic creatures and are immune to sleep effects.

Lust and Pride

Of the seven sins, lust and pride are unique among the runelords for these sins were only ever represented by a single runelord—and both still live during the events of this Adventure Path. This may change once the events of Revenge of the Runelords come to a conclusion, in which case the sinful foci for lust and pride become potential options for risen runelords of Sorshen or Xanderghul, but during Revenge of the Runelords, no risen runelords of lust or pride can exist.

Risen Runelord Gear

A risen runelord's polearm is an extension of their being and cannot exist without them, vanishing upon their death. This doesn't prevent a risen runelord from claiming, carrying, or using other items, and most higher-level risen runelords keep real magic items that remain behind after their death.

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The risen runelord ends one condition affecting them.

items.name: Beyond Life
items.description: A risen runelord may drink or eat for pleasure or entertainment, but they need not do so for nourishment and never suffer the effects of thirst or starvation.

items.name: Мифическая устойчивость [Воля]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Триггер: Существо умрёт и имеет хотя бы 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The creature remains standing and conscious, and recovers 50% of its maximum Hit Points.

items.name: Vanishing Death
items.description: When a risen runelord is slain, their body and (if manifested) polearm vanishes as the trapped legacy that was drawn upon to create them is set free, exploding outward in a riot of swirling color. This release of arcane energy hammers the minds of nearby creatures. All creatures adjacent to a risen runelord during their vanishing death must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:27] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 24 hours (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure) as fragments of their own memories are temporarily scrambled or hidden. Other objects carried by the risen runelord fall to the ground.

items.name: Manifest Runelord's Polearm
items.description:
Требования: The risen runelord isn't holding a runelord's polearm

Эффект: The risen runelord causes their runelord's polearm to appear in one of their hands. The exact appearance of the polearm depends on the type wielded by the runelord in life, but these weapons are purely spiritual constructs that inflict mental damage on a Strike and vanish as soon as the risen runelord releases the weapon or dies.

items.name: Мифическая сила
items.description: У существа есть запас из 3 Очков Мифа, и оно может потратить эти Очки Мифа на любое из своих действий.

items.name: Ускоренное колдовство
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: If the risen runelord's next action is to cast a cantrip or spell that's 4th-rank or lower, reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

items.name: Перезарядка
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The risen runelord regains an expended spell slot or can use Quickened Casting again.

items.name: Стойкое колдовство
items.description: If a reaction would disrupt the risen runelord's spellcasting action, the risen runelord attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. On a success, the action isn't disrupted.

Risen Runelord Kaliphesta.name: Risen Runelord Kaliphesta
Risen Runelord Kaliphesta.description:
Risen runelords are created by a powerful ritual invented by Runelord Xanderghul—a ritual called raise runelord. All risen runelords are at least level 11 creatures. Once created, a risen runelord has no capacity to become more powerful, as they are manifestations of their legacy at a specific point in time (although given enough time and resources, a risen runelord could potentially find a way to overcome this limitation on self-improvement).

A risen runelord has a modicum of free will, but as long as the one who created them via raise runelord lives, they're bound to their creator's desires. A risen runelord ordered to undertake obviously self-destructive actions might, at the GM's discretion, resist the command and could potentially even break free of their creator's control.

Since raise runelord draws upon a runelord's legacy as it exists within the Dreamlands, no risen runelord can ever sleep or dream. Xanderghul can use a risen runelord in a special way: he can use any risen runelord (including ones he didn't create) as a spare body. If he's slain, his soul can instantly jump to the closest risen runelord to replace them and continue the fight, unless the PCs can disable this defense during the second adventure in Revenge of the Runelords. Regardless of level, all risen runelords are mythic creatures and are immune to sleep effects.

Lust and Pride

Of the seven sins, lust and pride are unique among the runelords for these sins were only ever represented by a single runelord—and both still live during the events of this Adventure Path. This may change once the events of Revenge of the Runelords come to a conclusion, in which case the sinful foci for lust and pride become potential options for risen runelords of Sorshen or Xanderghul, but during Revenge of the Runelords, no risen runelords of lust or pride can exist.

Risen Runelord Gear

A risen runelord's polearm is an extension of their being and cannot exist without them, vanishing upon their death. This doesn't prevent a risen runelord from claiming, carrying, or using other items, and most higher-level risen runelords keep real magic items that remain behind after their death.

items.name: Снять состояние
items.description:
Стоимость: 1 Очко Мифа

Эффект: The risen runelord ends one condition affecting them.

items.name: Beyond Life
items.description: A risen runelord may drink or eat for pleasure or entertainment, but they need not do so for nourishment and never suffer the effects of thirst or starvation.

items.name: Vanishing Death
items.description: When a risen runelord is slain, their body and (if manifested) polearm vanishes as the trapped legacy that was drawn upon to create them is set free, exploding outward in a riot of swirling color. Other objects carried by the risen runelord fall to the ground.

items.name: Beyond Life

items.name: Мифическая устойчивость [Воля и Рефлекс]
items.description: Существо считает результаты своих указанных спасбросков на одну степень успеха лучше. Это не суммируется с другими эффектами, которые изменяют степень успеха, такими как признак @Trait[Incapacitation]{недееспособность} (за исключением выпадения натуральных 1 или 20). Каждый раз, когда монстр получает "Мифическую устойчивость", выберите один спасбросок. Это умение следует применять в первую очередь на самых высоких спасбросках существа.

items.name: Vanishing Death
items.description:
When a risen runelord is slain, their body and (if manifested) polearm vanishes as the trapped legacy that was drawn upon to create them is set free, exploding outward in a riot of swirling color. All creatures adjacent to a risen runelord during their vanishing death must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:37] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 24 hours (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure) as fragments of their own memories are temporarily scrambled or hidden. Other objects carried by the risen runelord fall to the ground.

This ability only occurs if Chromatic Aegis does not.

items.name: Chromatic Aegis
items.description:
Стоимость: all of Karzoug's Mythic Points

Требования: Aethusa's Prison hazard hasn't been destroyed

Триггер: Karzoug would die and has at least 1 Mythic Point

Эффект: Karzoug uses his dying breath to destroy Aethusa's prison and wrap himself in the remnants of its magical energy. Karzoug remains standing and conscious, and he recovers @Damage[166[healing]] Hit Points. He becomes immune to the type of elemental damage the prison was focused on when Karzoug used this ability. At the end of Risen Runelord Karzoug's next turn, he vanishes entirely, reappearing somewhere distant in the Universe. His gear (his chromatic robe and the slate of distant letters) remains behind. While the risen runelord no longer takes part in this Adventure Path, he might, at your discretion, rise again in a future campaign of your design. This ability replaces the Undying Myth ability most mythic creatures of this level have.
